title: B2B Sales Representative (Remote – Philippines) – Recruitment Services
description:
Location:

Remote (Philippines only)  

Work Hours: Flexible, aligned with Australian business hours (you will be given your specific working window)



Job Type:

Longterm, 1year minimum contract (with strong possibility of extension based on performance)





About the Role

We are looking for a driven B2B Sales Representative based in the Philippines to actively sell our recruitment and staffing services to businesses in Australia and overseas. You will focus on outbound prospecting, lead generation, and closing new clients for our recruitment business.



You will work remotely from the Philippines, following clear sales processes, scripts, and tools we provide. This is a long?term role with performance?based incentives and the opportunity to grow into a senior sales or account?management position.





Key Responsibilities

- Prospect and qualify potential clients (business owners, HR managers, hiring managers) via LinkedIn,
, and cold calling.  

- Follow up with leads, schedule discovery calls, and present our recruitment services.  

- Hit monthly KPIs for calls, meetings booked, and new clients signed.  

- Manage opportunities in the CRM and keep all activity accurately recorded.  

- Provide feedback on what messaging and offers work best with prospects.  

- Work closely with the recruitment team to ensure smooth handover of new clients.





Requirements

- At least 2 years of experience in outbound B2B sales (staffing, recruitment, lead generation, or similar services preferred).  

- Excellent English communication (both spoken and written).  

- Comfortable with cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, and
 campaigns.  

- Confident closing new clients and discussing pricing/service options.  

- Ability to work independently, stay focused, and meet targets.  

- Stable internet, quiet workspace, and a laptop or PC.  

- Availability during Australian business hours (flexible, but you must be able to cover part of this window).





What We Offer

- Long?term opportunity (initial 12?month contract, with potential for renewal).  

- Clear commission / performance structure based on new clients, meetings, and targets (exact details discussed in interview).  

- Training on our recruitment services, sales process, and tools.  

- Remote work from anywhere in the Philippines.  

- Regular performance reviews and opportunities for bonuses and role growth.





How to Apply

Please apply via OnlineJobs.ph and include:  

- A short introduction explaining your sales experience and why you’re interested in this role.  

- Your expected monthly rate.

- Your availability (timezone/work hours you can commit to).  

- Any experience selling recruitment, staffing, or B2B services.



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for online interview.

title: Assistant Manager of Purchasing
description:
Job Scope

- Update standard operation systems for supply chain management (Purchasing management, Inventory control, in-house transportation, etc.), by working closely with the Senior Purchasing Manager.

- Collect requirements from staff in HQ, Regional and properties about new items/suppliers and operation system improvement.

- Source new suppliers to reduce cost or improve condition for delivery time, credit term and so on.

- Create good relationships with current suppliers and negotiate to reduce cost or improve conditions for delivery time, credit term and so on.

- Resolve vendor or contractor grievances, and claims against suppliers.

- Conduct training and manage/support staffs’ activities regarding purchasing operation.

- Prepare PR (purchase requisitions) and PO (purchase orders) among team members, supplies, and vendors.

- Manage history of order and monitor inventory/delivery status by purchasing management system.

- Review, evaluate, and approve specifications for issuing and awarding bids.

- Direct and coordinate activities of personnel engaged in buying, selling, and distributing materials, equipment, machinery, and supplies.



Required Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Hospitality Management, or a related field

- At least 1–3 years of experience in purchasing or procurement, preferably in the hotel or hospitality industry

- Basic knowledge of purchasing procedures and inventory control

- Familiarity with hotel purchasing systems and documentation

- Good command of written and spoken English

- Proficiency in MS Office, especially Excel



Other Requirements

- Knowledge of hotel procurement standards, including sourcing, quotation comparison, and supplier coordination

- Familiarity with Philippine compliance and documentation related to purchasing and payments

- Ability to coordinate with suppliers, warehouse, and accounting teams

- Ability to monitor purchase orders, deliveries, and stock levels

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Willingness to work flexible hours when required

- Willingness to travel frequently between hotel properties (and office)



Competencies

- Strong negotiation and communication skills

- Good organizational and time management skills

- Attention to detail and cost-awareness

- Problem-solving skills

- Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams

- Integrity and accountability in handling purchasing transactions

title: Assistant Manager of  HR
description:

1. Recruitment & Staffing

- Manage end-to-end recruitment processes for assigned properties, including manpower planning, job postings, screening, interviewing, and onboarding

- Coordinate with hiring managers to understand staffing needs and timelines

- Ensure recruitment practices align with company standards and local labor regulations

2. Payroll & Compensation

3. HR Operations & Employee Relations

title: Sales & Engagement VA for Online Education Business (Setter + Social Media + Tracking)
description:
About Us

We run a 12-week online program that helps educators and education professionals build profitable teaching businesses without quitting their jobs. We work with passionate, mission-driven educators who are tired of salary caps and institutional red tape. They want to own their expertise and build income on their terms. We're growing fast and need a sharp, sales-minded VA to help us scale.



What You'll Do

Your primary job is to move conversations toward enrollment.

You'll be the first voice prospects hear from us. You'll engage with cold and warm leads on social media, respond to DMs, qualify interest, book discovery calls for our co-founder, and track everything so nothing falls through the cracks.

This role requires flexibility and eagerness to learn. You'll need to step in and be trained on whatever the business needs as we grow — whether that's refining DM scripts, testing new outreach strategies, or supporting other areas of the business. We're looking for someone who sees this as an opportunity to grow with us, not just complete tasks.

Daily Responsibilities:

DM Management & Lead Engagement



Monitor and respond to messages across LinkedIn, Instagram,
, and TikTok

Use our proven scripts to move cold and warm leads toward discovery calls

Follow up consistently with prospects using our outreach sequences

Identify high-intent prospects and book calls with our closer



Lead Qualification



Ask qualifying questions before booking calls (current role, pain points, timeline)

Flag hot leads to prioritize

Politely redirect poor-fit prospects



Call Booking & Coordination



Send Calendly links to qualified leads

Confirm calls 24 hours in advance and send reminders

Update tracker with call outcomes (showed / no-showed / rescheduled / closed)



Tracking & Reporting



Update DM tracker daily (who was contacted, responses, next steps)

Update sales tracker after each discovery call

Provide weekly reports on activity and results



Light Social Media Engagement (As needed)



Like and comment on posts from warm leads

Respond to story replies and engagement

Maintain a warm, relational presence online





Who You Are

Must-Haves:



? Sales experience — You've done appointment-setting, lead generation, or sales support before. You understand how to move conversations toward a goal.

? Amazing conversational English — You write like a real person, not a robot. Your grammar is flawless and your tone is warm and natural.

? Admin skills — You're organized, detail-oriented, and can manage multiple conversations and tracking systems without dropping the ball.

? Eager learner — You're excited to be trained on new systems, tools, and strategies. You don't just want to complete tasks — you want to understand the business and grow with it.

? Cultural fit — You're proactive, positive, and collaborative. You bring solutions, not just problems. You communicate clearly and take ownership of your work.



Strong Pluses:



???? Previous experience in education, coaching, or course-creator industries

???? Experience with CRM systems or pipeline management tools

???? Comfortable working with U.S.-based clients in similar time zones



Personality Fit:



Relational and warm — You genuinely enjoy connecting with people. Our audience is educators — they can spot inauthenticity immediately.

Results-driven — You're energized by hitting goals and seeing conversations turn into booked calls and closed sales.

Comfortable with sales — You don't shy away from asking for the call. You see it as helping, not pushing.

Fast-moving and adaptable — You're comfortable with change and evolving systems. You don't need everything to be perfect before you act.

Proactive and enthusiastic — You see what needs to happen and make it happen without being told.

Coachable — You take feedback well and improve quickly.





Compensation & Hours

Starting Rate: $4.00/hour

Hours: 20–25 hours per week to start (potential to grow to 30–40 hours based on performance and business needs)

Commission: $125 per closed sale (begins after your first month of employment)

Payment: Weekly via PayPal, Wise, or your preferred method

How Earnings Work:

Month 1 (Training Period):



You'll earn your base hourly rate while you learn our systems, scripts, and processes

No commission during Month 1 — this is your ramp-up period



Month 2 and Beyond:



Base pay continues at $4/hour

You earn $125 commission for every prospect you engage with who enrolls in our program

Commission is paid weekly along with your base pay



Commission Eligibility: You earn commission when a prospect you directly engaged with (via DM, follow-up, or booking coordination) enrolls in our program. We track this through our DM and sales trackers, so you'll always know which leads are yours.

Example Monthly Earnings (After Month 1):



Base (25 hours/week × 4 weeks × $4/hour): $400/month

Commission (3 closed sales/month × $125): +$375/month

Total potential: $775+/month



High Performer Example:



Base: $400/month

Commission (5 closed sales/month × $125): +$625/month

Total: $1,025+/month



As you prove yourself and take on more responsibility, we're open to raising your base rate and increasing commission structure.



Work Schedule & Availability

Required Working Hours:

We need someone available during U.S. Central Time (CST) business hours, specifically:



Monday–Friday: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (at least partial overlap required)

Some flexibility required for evening coverage (7:00–9:00 PM CST) 2–3 nights per week when discovery calls happen



You don't need to work all those hours, but you need to be responsive during those windows.

Start Date: As soon as possible (we're ready to onboard the right person immediately)



How to Apply

IMPORTANT: Applications missing ANY of these requirements will be deleted without review.

To apply, you MUST:

1. Use exactly 9 Application Points (AP) when submitting your application through OnlineJobs.ph

2. Use this exact
 subject line:

"Sales VA – [Your First Name] – 9 AP"

3. Submit a short video no more than 2-minutes on Loom, unlisted YouTube, or another platform where you:



Introduce yourself

Explain why you're interested in a sales/setter role (not just general VA work)

Confirm your internet speed and availability during CST hours



4. Include in your application message on OnlineJobs.ph:



Your resume (attach as PDF)

Link to your Loom/YouTube intro video

Your specific availability (which hours you can work in CST, Monday–Friday)

Confirm you used exactly 9 Application Points





Application Checklist (Check These Off Before Submitting):



 I used exactly 9 Application Points when applying

 My subject line is: "Sales VA – [My First Name] – 9 AP"

 I included a short intro video less than 2 minutes (Loom, YouTube, or other medium)

 I attached my resume as a PDF

 I confirmed my internet speed and CST availability in my video

 I stated my specific availability hours in my application



Applications that don't follow these instructions exactly will be deleted without review.

This is your first test of attention to detail — the same skill you'll need every day in this role.



Why Work With Us?

? Meaningful mission — You're helping educators take control of their income and build businesses they own

? Growth opportunity — We're scaling fast. Prove yourself and this role can grow with you (more hours, higher pay, expanded responsibilities)

? Direct mentorship — You'll work closely with experienced business builders

? Performance-based rewards — We reward results, not just hours logged

? Supportive, collaborative team — We value proactive communication, ownership, and getting better every week

? Fast-moving environment — We're building in real-time. You'll see the direct impact of your work immediately



We're looking for an eager learner with sales experience, exceptional English skills, and the right cultural fit — someone who sees this as more than just "a VA job."

If that's you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Trilingual Translator (Filipino/English/Chinese)
description:
Job Description: Trilingual Translator (Filipino/English/Chinese)



Job Title: Trilingual Translator & Interpreter

Location: [City/Remote/Hybrid]

Employment Type: Full-Time / Freelance / Contract

Reports To: [e.g., Localization Manager / Operations Director]



Role Overview



We are seeking a highly skilled Trilingual Translator to facilitate communication across Tagalog (Filipino), English, and Chinese (Mandarin and Cantonese). The ideal candidate will act as a linguistic and cultural bridge, ensuring that technical documents, marketing materials, and verbal communications are accurately conveyed across these languages.



Key Responsibilities



Translation & Localization (Written)



· Translate a variety of documents from English to Filipino (Tagalog), English to Chinese (Simplified/Traditional), and vice versa.

· Localize marketing content to resonate with Filipino and Chinese-speaking audiences, adapting idioms and cultural references appropriately.

· Proofread and edit translations produced by other team members or automated tools to ensure accuracy, consistency, and brand voice.



Interpretation (Verbal)



· Provide real-time interpretation during business meetings, conference calls, and site visits between Filipino, English, Mandarin, and Cantonese speakers.

· Handle consecutive or simultaneous interpretation as required for negotiations or training sessions.



Cultural Consulting



· Advise management on cultural nuances and etiquette when dealing with Filipino and Chinese counterparts.

· Flag potential cultural misunderstandings in communications or business practices.



Cantonese Specialization



· Specifically manage interpretation/translation for Cantonese-speaking stakeholders, ensuring clarity between Cantonese and Mandarin documents/audio when required.



Qualifications



Education & Experience



· Bachelor’s degree in Linguistics, Translation, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent work experience).

· Minimum [2-3] years of professional translation/interpretation experience.

· Native or near-native proficiency in Tagalog and English.

· Professional working proficiency in Mandarin (Simplified) and Cantonese.



Skills & Competencies



· Linguistic Excellence: Deep understanding of grammar, syntax, and idioms in all four language variants.

· Dialect Awareness: Must be able to distinguish between and accurately translate Cantonese and Mandarin where they diverge.

· Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with CAT tools (e.g., Trados, MemoQ) is a plus. Proficiency in MS Office and Google Workspace.

· Soft Skills: Excellent active listening, attention to detail, and the ability to remain calm under pressure (especially during live interpretation).

· Cultural Sensitivity: Deep understanding of Philippine, Chinese, and Western business etiquette.



Preferred (Nice to Have)



· Experience in Legal and Finance 

· Certification from a recognized translation/interpretation body.

· Experience with subtitling or voice-over coordination

title: Cartoon & Animated Ad Creator (AI-Powered) — DTC Health Brand
description:
About Us

We are a fast-scaling direct-to-consumer health & wellness brand based in Europe, serving customers across the Netherlands, Belgium, and Scandinavia. We run aggressive performance marketing campaigns on Meta 
 & Instagram) and are building one of the most efficient remote creative teams in Europe.

We move fast. We test constantly. And we need someone who can keep up.



The Role

This is NOT a traditional animation or illustration job.

We're looking for an AI-powered Cartoon Ad Creator who specializes in scroll-stopping, high-converting animated creatives for Meta 
 & Instagram). You won't just make things look pretty — you'll be building cartoon-style ad assets that grab cold audiences by the throat and turn them into paying customers.

Cartoon and animated ads are one of the highest-performing creative formats right now. We're going all in — and we need someone who lives and breathes this format.

You'll work directly with our creative strategist, producing multiple cartoon ad variations per week — all built with AI-assisted workflows.



What You'll Be Creating



Cartoon / Animated Ads: Scroll-stopping, character-driven animated creatives optimized for Meta feeds and Reels — this is your primary output

Hook Variations: Multiple animated opening hooks per concept for systematic split testing

Story-Format Ads: Short animated narratives (problem ? solution ? CTA) built for cold traffic conversion

Static Cartoon Creatives: AI-generated illustrated stills and cartooned product visuals for ad sets

Concept Iterations: Fast turnaround on multiple style variations per brief



Key Responsibilities



Produce conversion-focused cartoon and animated ads optimized for Meta 
 & Instagram)

Transform written briefs and scripts into character-driven animated ad creatives

Use AI tools (image gen, animation tools, video upscalers) to produce 10–15+ creatives per week

Create multiple hook variations per concept for A/B testing

Collaborate closely with the creative strategist and iterate quickly based on ad performance data

Stay current on cartoon and animation trends across Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



What We're Looking For



2+ years of experience creating animated or cartoon-style content — preferably for performance marketing or DTC/eCommerce brands

Deep, hands-on experience with AI image and animation tools: Midjourney, Leonardo, Flux, DALL-E, Runway, Pika, Kling, or similar

Experience bringing characters and scenes to life with motion: CapCut Pro, Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, or equivalent

Proven understanding of direct-response marketing: hooks, pattern interrupts, problem-agitate-solve structure

Able to produce 10–15+ cartoon ad creatives per week using AI-assisted workflows

Fast, organized, and proactive — able to manage multiple briefs at once

Fluent in English (written and spoken)

Reliable internet connection and own equipment



This Role Won't Suit You If You...



Focus only on aesthetics and ignore performance metrics

Have no experience producing content for Meta Ads

Struggle with fast feedback loops or tight turnaround times

Need constant step-by-step supervision

Are unavailable for full-time consistent work



What We Offer



Stable, long-term full-time position with a fast-growing European brand

Work directly with the founder and creative strategist — no layers of bureaucracy

Real creative ownership: your animations directly impact business results

Performance bonuses based on winning ad creatives

Access to paid AI tool subscriptions

Freedom to experiment with cutting-edge tools and the latest animation formats

A fast-paced team that values speed, creativity, and measurable impact



Ready to Apply?

We only review applications submitted through our Typeform. Please copy and paste this link into your browser (remove spaces):



Only candidates who complete the Typeform will be considered. It takes less than 8 minutes — we'll respond within 3–5 business days.

title: Junior AI Web Dev | Claude Code, SEO & n8n Specialist
description:
We are a Marketing & Web Development Agency. We are growing fast, and our project pipeline is exploding. We are not looking for a "Virtual Assistant" or a "Junior Prompt Engineer." We are looking for a Technical Architect who builds websites using Cloud Code, AI-Native workflows, and technical SEO knowledge. We are open to part-time or full-time, but our goal is a long-term partnership with someone who wants to scale their career alongside us over the next 2-3 years



The Mission: 100% Ownership

We don’t believe in vertical task-splitting. You won't just build "drafts" for someone else to fix. You own the delivery from the first terminal command to the final SEO audit.



>>>> Architecture: Build and iterate high-performance web structures using Claude Code (CLI). We do not use UI-wrappers like Cursor or Lovable.



>>>> Engineering: Architect complex n8n workflows and API integrations that actually hold up under load.



>>>> Functional Design: Take our templates and individualize them. It’s not about "graphic masterpieces," but about professional, high-converting business assets.



>>>> The Final Mile: Full responsibility for GMB profile setups and technical SEO (schema, metadata, site structure). If it’s not 100% ready for the client, it’s not finished.



Who You Are

>>>> Terminal Native: The CLI is your natural habitat. If you depend on a GUI, you are not the right fit.

>>>> Logic over Vibes: You understand how to prompt, but more importantly, you understand the code the AI generates. You fix hallucinations manually.

>>>> Process-Driven: You have high personal standards. You follow SOPs and checklists with military precision because you hate sloppy work.

>>>> Impact-Driven: You want a long-term future in a fast-growing agency, not a temporary gig. You are ready to step up and take the delivery lead.



Salary & Benefits

>>>> Competitive Salary: $800+ USD / month (based on skill and speed). 

>>>> Bonuses + Incentives

>>>> Deep Work: No useless meetings. We value focus and output.

>>>> Growth: You are in the front row of AI development. We invest in people who invest in themselves.



HOW TO APPLY (The Filter)

Generic applications and "standard" cover letters will be deleted without being read. If you want us to take you seriously, answer the following:

>>>> Start your application with: "Full Menu Delivery"



AND



>>>> Briefly explain your CLI-first workflow. Why is Claude Code your tool of choice for scaling?

OR

>>>> Describe the most complex n8n workflow or API integration you’ve built solo.

OR

>>>> Show us one project where you took a template and individualized it into a high-quality functional result.

title: Sales Admin Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Onboarding & Documentation

Own the full client onboarding lifecycle — from intake through KYC/AML documentation, compliance review, and account activation — ensuring every file is complete, accurate, and audit-ready before submission.

Prepare and coordinate all onboarding documentation including subscription agreements, client questionnaires, and regulatory forms, working closely with the compliance and operations teams to meet applicable standards.

Proactively track onboarding status for all active clients, following up on outstanding items and escalating blockers to avoid delays in the activation timeline.

Maintain a structured, version-controlled onboarding repository that can withstand internal or regulatory audit at any point.



Client Relationship Support

Serve as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing timely, professional responses and managing expectations on resolution timelines.

Coordinate all client-facing logistics — meetings, product demonstrations, webinars, and review calls — ensuring preparation materials, agendas, and follow-up notes are managed without requiring senior team members to chase.

Maintain accurate, current client records in the CRM; flag data anomalies, contact changes, or missing information proactively rather than reactively.

Support the relationship management team in preparing client update materials, periodic reports, and tailored communications.



Sales & Administrative Support

Support the sales team with scheduling, calendar management, CRM maintenance, and preparation of pitch materials and proposals.

Maintain internal trackers and action logs for client interactions, onboarding milestones, and sales pipeline activity.

Identify and flag opportunities to streamline administrative workflows using available technology tools.



Requirements:

3–5 years of experience in client onboarding, client servicing, or relationship support within financial services, fintech, or asset management

Hands-on experience managing KYC/AML documentation and compliance-driven onboarding processes end-to-end — not just assisting

Strong proficiency in CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot) and Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

Excellent written English communication skills; able to draft professional client-facing correspondence independently and accurately

Structured, detail-oriented approach to documentation management with a track record of maintaining audit-ready files

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple concurrent client onboarding workflows without supervision

Comfortable working remotely and independently, aligned to Singapore / KL business hours (SGT/MYT)

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link - 

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company producing high-converting video ads for DTC brands in industries such as supplements, footwear, and lifestyle products.



We are looking to hire 2 AI Video Editors to start immediately by the end of this week.



The ideal candidate can create extremely realistic AI-generated video ads that are indistinguishable from real footage, with strong editing and creative skills for direct-response advertising.



This role is ideal for someone who understands performance marketing, high-volume creative production, and AI video generation tools.





What You'll Do

• Produce 20–50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Create AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll scenes using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta Ads Library and Google to develop high-converting ad variations

• Concept, build, and iterate multiple creative angles and hooks that drive conversions

• Assist with script refinement or hook optimization when needed (scripts usually provided)





What We're Looking For

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio

• Ability to create extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Strong understanding of direct-response ad creative and what makes ads convert

• Ability to work independently and produce high-volume creative output





Nice to Have

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools

• Experience creating UGC-style ads for paid social





Role Details

• Part-time role (32 hours per week)

• Flexible schedule Monday–Saturday

• Remote position

• We are hiring 2 editors immediately and expect onboarding by the end of this week





How to Apply

To confirm you read this entire post, start your application with the phrase:



AICreator492



Then answer the following questions:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut. 

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced). 

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"? 

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential? 

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit? 

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.





If you're passionate about AI video creation, performance marketing, and high-volume creative production, we'd love to hear from you.

description:
Summary:



We are looking for a creative and performance driven Video Editor who can produce engaging marketing videos that help generate sales for our e commerce brand.



Our products focus on compact and travel friendly hair styling tools designed for modern lifestyles. Your role will be to transform raw footage, user generated content, and AI generated assets into high performing video creatives that capture attention and encourage customers to purchase.



The ideal candidate understands how video creatives influence customer behavior on platforms such as
, Instagram, and TikTok. You will work closely with our marketing team to create short form videos that highlight product benefits, demonstrate real usage, and drive measurable revenue through advertising campaigns.



If you enjoy combining creativity with performance marketing and understand how video content converts viewers into buyers, we would love to see your portfolio.



How Your Work Generates Revenue



Your video creatives will directly contribute to revenue generation through:



Product demonstration videos that show how the tools are used.



Before and after styling transformations that highlight visible results.



Lifestyle videos showing travel convenience and everyday usability.



UGC style testimonials that build trust with new customers.



Short form ads optimized for Meta and TikTok conversions.



Key Responsibilities

Video Creative Production

Edit engaging short form video creatives used for paid advertising, social media campaigns, and product promotions.



Product Demonstration Content

Produce videos that clearly demonstrate the benefits, features, and convenience of our hair styling tools.



UGC and AI Based Content

Work with user generated content, influencer clips, and AI generated assets to create authentic marketing creatives.



Visual Enhancements

Add captions, motion graphics, transitions, and overlays that improve storytelling and viewer retention.



AI Voice Integration

Create and integrate AI voice overs when needed to enhance video narratives.



Creative Research

Monitor current advertising trends and viral product videos to continuously improve creative performance.



Performance Optimization

Edit video creatives with the goal of improving engagement, click through rates, and conversions.



Requirements

Experience editing videos for advertising, e commerce, or social media brands.



A strong portfolio demonstrating product focused video creatives.



Proficiency in editing tools such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or CapCut.



Understanding of short form video content optimized for Meta, Instagram, and TikTok.



Ability to produce engaging, fast paced creatives designed to capture attention within the first few seconds.



Basic knowledge of graphic design tools such as Photoshop or Illustrator is an advantage.



Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with marketing teams.



Attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects.



AI Skills



Applicants should have experience using AI tools for video production such as:



AI voice generation tools

AI UGC or avatar creation platforms

AI assisted editing tools

AI based script generation tools



Work Setup

Work from home



Expected Output

The expected production 2 quality video creatives per day.



Compensation

$350 Fix Rate per month + Bonuses

title: E-commerce & Marketplace Growth Lead
description:
Toyomi is a trusted Singapore home appliance brand with a long-standing presence in the market. As we continue to strengthen our direct-to-consumer and marketplace business, we are looking for an E-commerce & Marketplace Growth Lead to own and grow our online sales across Shopify 
, TikTok Shop, and other key e-commerce platforms.

This role covers the day-to-day management and growth of our e-commerce channels. You will be responsible for listings, promotions, platform campaigns, affiliate creator coordination, livestream support, stock coordination, customer and order support coordination, and performance tracking, while working closely with internal teams to ensure smooth execution and commercial growth.

This role is not primarily focused on Shopee and Lazada account management, but on growing our broader e-commerce business across Shopify, TikTok Shop, and other key digital sales channels.



< KEY>

Manage daily e-commerce operations across Shopify and all major sales platforms

Own and maintain product listings, pricing, descriptions, images, bundles, and promotions across channels

Manage TikTok Shop as a key growth platform, including product setup, campaign support, ad creation, affiliate creator coordination, and livestream support

Search for, recruit, and coordinate TikTok Shop affiliate creators to drive sales and visibility

Plan and execute online promotions, launches, bundles, and campaign mechanics across platforms

Support TikTok Shop livestream setup and execution, including promotions, flash sales, vouchers, product selection, and ad support

Coordinate stock updates and inventory availability across all e-commerce channels

Monitor sales performance, conversion, and platform health, and recommend actions to improve GMV

Propose ideas to improve sales, conversion, visibility, and repeat purchase rates

Suggest new tools, workflows, or initiatives to improve e-commerce operations and efficiency

Support basic on-page and off-page SEO improvements across product pages, collections, and website content to improve visibility and traffic

Work closely with design, marketing, warehouse, and operations teams to ensure timely campaign execution

Support homepage, landing page, collection, and merchandising updates on Shopify

Coordinate participation in platform campaigns, sales events, and promotional opportunities

Provide customer support and order support, including helping to coordinate responses to order issues, product concerns, and fulfilment matters

Prepare regular e-commerce performance reports and highlight growth opportunities

Monitor competitor activity, platform trends, and new opportunities to improve sales and brand visibility

Support KOL, creator, affiliate, and livestream coordination where relevant



< SKILLS>

Experience managing Shopify, TikTok Shop, and other e-commerce or marketplace platforms

Good understanding of e-commerce operations, product listings, promotions, and stock coordination

Experience with TikTok Shop operations and affiliate creator coordination

Strong planning, organisation, and project coordination skills

Able to analyse sales performance and recommend practical actions for growth

Good written and spoken English

Able to work across different teams and follow up independently

Detail-oriented, proactive, and commercially minded

Familiarity with basic SEO principles for e-commerce



< GOOD>

Basic Shopify UI/UX knowledge and application skills, including an understanding of what improves user experience and conversion

Experience with EDM platforms,
, or other digital marketing channels

Basic understanding of creative briefing and visual merchandising for e-commerce

title: SEO Content Writer
description:
Why This Role Exists

We are not looking for a "content producer" to fill a blog with words. We need a Growth Operator who views content as a scalable acquisition channel.



This role is designed to provide Founder and Marketing Leverage by owning the entire lifecycle of organic authority. You won’t just be writing articles; you will be architecting a library of high-intent assets that capture search traffic and convert it into revenue. In this role, you bridge the gap between creative storytelling and technical SEO, ensuring that every word published serves a strategic purpose in our growth engine.



What You’ll Be Responsible For (Outcomes)

Research and execute comprehensive pillar pages and "evergreen" guides that establish us as the definitive voice in our space.

Write and optimize page copy that satisfies both the Google algorithm and human psychology, maintaining a delicate balance between SEO density and high-velocity CTAs.

Produce in-depth, long-form assets (1,500+ words) designed to rank for high-difficulty keywords by solving for user intent better than any competitor on page one.

Own the "freshness" of our digital library. You will proactively audit, rewrite, and re-optimize existing content to defend rankings and improve click-through rates (CTR).

Execute flawless on-page SEO—from semantic keyword integration and internal linking structures to meta-data and schema—ensuring 100% crawlability and relevance.

Requirements

What You’ve Done Before

You have a portfolio of content that currently ranks in the top 3 positions for competitive, high-intent keywords.

You are a power user of Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, or similar tools, using them to find "content gaps" that competitors have missed.

You have experience translating complex technical concepts into clear, persuasive prose for sophisticated professional audiences.

You’ve managed content calendars where success was measured by organic traffic growth and lead conversion, not just "word count."

Who You Are

You don’t need a brief to tell you what to write. You dig into the data, identify what the market is searching for, and build the solution.

You understand that modern SEO is about Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness. You write for humans first, knowing that’s what Google rewards.

You understand the "why" behind site architecture and how content affects the broader technical health of a domain.

You thrive in high-growth environments where speed of execution and quality of output are equally weighted.

Who This Is NOT For

The "Generalist" Blogger: If your experience is primarily in lifestyle writing or high-volume, low-quality "content farms," this isn't the right fit.

The AI-Only Writer: We value efficiency, but if your process is "prompt and publish" without deep original research and strategic layering, you won't meet our standards.

The Task-Taker: If you need a manager to assign you every topic and keyword, you will find our pace challenging.

What Success Looks Like

Month 1: Comprehensive audit of existing top-performing content; identification of 5 "low-hanging fruit" keywords; first 2 high-intent pillar posts published.

Month 3: Measurable upward trend in organic impressions and "Position 1-3" keyword rankings; landing page conversion rates stabilized through A/B testing.

Month 6: The organic channel is a predictable lead-generation machine, with a compounding library of assets that allow the leadership team to scale back on paid spend.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):



Organic Traffic Growth: Month-over-month increase in targeted search traffic.

Keyword Velocity: Number of target keywords moving into the Top 10.

Conversion Rate: Percentage of readers moving from blog/guide to a lead action.

Content Freshness Score: 100% of "Core" assets updated within the last 6 months.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

Peripherals and Workspace:

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: Community & Partnerships Manager
description:
Company: Hypervibe & Sage Space Technologies

Employment Type: Part-Time (4–6 hours per day, with potential to grow into full-time)

Compensation: $6–$9 USD per hour (depending on experience)



About Us

Hypervibe is a global leader in whole body vibration technology, delivering science-backed solutions for fitness, rehabilitation, and performance.

Sage Space Technologies is pioneering a new category at the intersection of technology, wellness, and immersive sensory experiences.



We are building brands that combine cutting-edge technology with real-world impact—and we are looking for someone who can help us grow and engage our global community.



Role Overview

This is a hands-on role focused on community engagement, influencer outreach, and partnership growth.



You will manage conversations across our social platforms, build relationships with influencers and affiliates, and help grow a loyal, engaged customer and partner ecosystem.



This is not just a support role—we are looking for someone who can think strategically and contribute to growth.



Key Responsibilities



Community Management

Monitor and respond to comments and messages across our social media platforms

Engage with our audience in a way that reflects our brand voice and values

Identify opportunities to turn engagement into deeper relationships



Community Growth

Develop and execute strategies to build and grow our customer communities

Increase engagement, retention, and brand loyalty

Help turn customers into advocates



Influencer Research & Outreach

Research and identify relevant influencers, creators, and professionals aligned with our brands

Conduct outreach for collaborations and partnerships

Build and maintain a pipeline of potential partners



Affiliate & Reseller Management

Act as the main point of contact for existing affiliates and resellers

Support, nurture, and grow these relationships

Ensure affiliates remain active, engaged, and aligned with our brand



Partnership Growth

Develop strategies to grow our affiliate and reseller programs

Identify new partnership opportunities (e.g. therapists, clinics, gyms, wellness professionals)

Help scale partnerships into meaningful revenue channels



Minimum Requirements

Excellent command of English (both written and spoken)

At least 2 years of experience working remotely

Experience using a CRM such as HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar

Highly organized, proactive, and able to work independently



Technical & Work Setup Requirements

Private and dedicated workspace

Minimum 100 Mbps internet connection

Backup internet (ISP)

Desktop or laptop with at least 16GB RAM

Backup power supply and/or generator

High-quality noise-canceling headset



Working Hours & Flexibility

Our customers are located worldwide, across multiple time zones.



The ideal candidate is flexible and comfortable working across different time zones, including:

US hours (primary focus, as most customers are based in the United States)

Occasional Australian hours

Split shifts (e.g. part morning / part evening) when needed



What We’re Looking For

Experience in social media management, influencer outreach, or affiliate marketing

Strong communication and relationship-building skills

Ability to think strategically—not just execute tasks

Comfortable taking ownership and initiative

Interest in health, wellness, fitness, or emerging technologies is a strong plus



What Success Looks Like

Engaged and responsive social communities

A growing network of high-quality influencers and partners

Active and productive affiliates and resellers

Measurable contribution to brand growth and revenue



Why Join Us

Work with innovative, global brands in fast-growing industries

Opportunity to take ownership and make a real impact

Flexible remote work environment

Clear pathway to increased hours and long-term growth



To apply please submit your CV along with a 1-minute audio recording of yourself explaining why you would be a good fit for this position.



We are looking for someone who is not just looking for a job—but wants to grow with us.

title: Content Creator (Instagram)
description:
Why This Role Exists

We are not looking for a "Social Media Manager" to post updates and monitor comments. We need a Content Architect and Growth Operator who understands the mechanics of virality and the leverage of a creator ecosystem.



This role exists to transform our organic social presence into a high-performance acquisition channel. You will bridge the gap between creative storytelling and algorithmic performance, ensuring our Reels, Shorts, and Creator partnerships aren't just "aesthetic"—they are engineered for reach, retention, and revenue. By building a scalable Creator Program, you provide the Founder and Marketing Team with massive leverage, turning our brand into a content powerhouse that operates far beyond the capacity of a traditional internal team.



What You’ll Be Responsible For (Outcomes)

Architect and execute a high-velocity short-form video strategy across Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn. You own the hook, the script, and the retention logic that forces the algorithm to distribute our content.

Design, launch, and scale our Creator Program from the ground up. This includes structuring incentive models, creating "Virality Playbooks," and building the infrastructure to manage a fleet of external voices.

Provide strategic input on high-level assets—including website headlines, campaign visuals, and landing page structures—ensuring a cohesive, conversion-focused narrative across all touchpoints.

Identify emerging cultural and platform trends early and translate them into our B2B niche before they become saturated, maintaining our position as a forward-thinking market leader.

Move beyond vanity metrics. You will analyze watch-time data and drop-off points to relentlessly iterate on formats, doubling down on what drives follower growth and pipeline velocity.

Requirements

What You’ve Done Before

You have a proven track record (and the case studies to prove it) of growing accounts and generating millions of views through strategic short-form video.

You have experience recruiting, onboarding, and managing creators or influencers, moving past one-off posts into long-term performance partnerships.

You are an expert in narrative tension and retention editing. You know how to stop the scroll in the first 1.5 seconds.

You understand how to make professional services "bingeable" without sacrificing brand authority or institutional trust.

Who You Are

You don't wait for a content calendar. You spot a gap in the market, script the solution, and coordinate the production autonomously.

You use metrics to validate your creative intuition, but you understand that "virality" requires a human touch that a spreadsheet can't always predict.

You don't think in "posts"; you think in "franchises." You build repeatable content formats that scale and compound over time.

You are constantly studying platform updates and creator psychology to find the next 1?ge in distribution.

Who This Is NOT for

The "Aesthetic" Curator: If your main focus is on color palettes and grid layouts rather than watch-time and shareability, this is not a fit.

The Task-Follower: If you need a script provided to you to start filming, you will struggle in this high-autonomy role.

The Generalist: If you treat Reels the same way you treat a static LinkedIn post, you won't achieve the scale we are looking for.

What Success Looks Like

Month 1: Comprehensive audit of current social performance; first "Viral Format" pilot launched; Creator Program incentive structure finalized.

Month 3: A consistent 2x–3x lift in organic reach via Reels/Shorts; first cohort of 5–10 creators actively producing content under your guidelines.

Month 6: Organic social is a primary driver of top-of-funnel awareness; our Creator Program is a self-sustaining engine providing a constant stream of high-quality assets for the marketing team.

Minimum Technical and Work Environment Requirements:



Internet Connection:

Primary internet connection with a minimum speed of 15 Mbps.

Backup internet connection with at least 10 Mbps.

Backup connection must be capable of supporting work during a power outage.

Primary Device:

Desktop or laptop equipped with at least:

Intel Core i5 (8th generation or newer), Intel Core i3 (10th generation or newer), AMD Ryzen 5, or an equivalent processor.

A minimum of 8 GB RAM.

Backup Device:

Must meet or exceed the performance of an Intel Core i3 processor.

Must be functional during power interruptions.

A functioning webcam.

A noise-canceling USB headset.

A quiet, dedicated home office space.

Peripherals and Workspace: A smartphone for communication and verification purposes.

title: AI Image and Video Generation Specialist for Premium Jewellery Brand
description:
We are looking for a talented AI Image and Video Generation Specialist to join our men's fashion jewellery e-commerce brand initially on a part-time basis, moving to a full time role over time.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. We are starting with 2 hours per day, but there is strong potential for this role to grow as the brand expands.



We want someone highly skilled in AI content creation who can produce premium, photorealistic, product-accurate imagery and video content for a modern men's jewellery brand. You should have a strong eye for design, styling, and fashion, and be able to create content that feels aspirational, commercially strong, and aligned with our brand aesthetic.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, proactive, detail-oriented, and confident working independently. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of the creative process, work autonomously using their own initiative, and also follow direction well when needed.



About the role



You will create high-quality AI-generated image and video content for our brand across our website, social media,
 marketing, paid ads, and product launches.



Your work will include product imagery, lifestyle visuals, campaign-style content, and creative assets that help present our men's fashion jewellery in a premium and desirable way.



Initial hours and pay



• Part-time

• 2-3 hours per day to start

• Long-term role with potential for increased hours over time

• $3-6 per hour depending on experience and quality of work, with opportunity for pay growth



What you will be doing



• Create premium AI-generated image and video content for our jewellery brand

• Produce photorealistic and product-accurate visuals that are polished, realistic, and commercially appealing

• Create lifestyle imagery, campaign visuals, product-focused content, and marketing creatives

• Understand our brand aesthetic and translate it into exceptional visual content

• Develop strong prompts and workflows to achieve consistent, high-quality results

• Refine and improve outputs to ensure they are ready to use

• Create content that feels on-brand, aspirational, and designed to appeal to customers

• Generate variations for testing across different marketing channels

• Organise prompts, files, and workflows clearly and efficiently

• Stay up to date with the latest AI image and video tools and techniques



Who we are looking for



• An AI image and video expert with strong hands-on experience

• Someone with a great sense of design, fashion, styling, and visual composition

• Someone who can create men's jewellery content that looks premium, modern, and highly desirable

• Someone who understands how to make AI visuals look realistic, high-end, and accurate to the actual product

• Someone who can work completely autonomously, manage their time well, and take initiative without needing constant oversight

• Someone who is also able to take direction, understand feedback, and apply it accurately

• Someone reliable, professional, and genuinely interested in creating excellent work



Requirements



• Strong experience with AI image and video generation tools such as Midjourney, Flux, DALL·E, Runway, Kling, or similar

• Proven ability to create photorealistic and product-accurate imagery

• Strong understanding of branding, visual storytelling, and premium e-commerce content

• Strong sense of design, styling, colour, lighting, and overall image quality

• Experience refining AI outputs using editing software where needed

• Good written English and clear communication

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to work consistently during agreed hours



When applying, please include



• A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

• What AI image and video generation tools you have access to and are competent in

• What editing software you use

• Examples of similar work you have created for fashion, jewellery, product, or lifestyle brands



Why this is a great opportunity



• Long-term role with room to grow

• Flexible part-time hours to start

• Opportunity to work on a premium brand with strong visual direction

• Creative role with scope to make a real impact

• We value quality, initiative, and great work



Please only apply if you are confident in your ability to create high-quality, photorealistic, on-brand AI image and video content.



We are looking for someone exceptional and would love to find a long-term person to grow with our brand.

title: Urgent Financial Analyst with General Admin Experience
description:
We are urgently seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Analyst to support our CEO and Finance/Accounting Team. This role will work closely with our current Financial Analyst and assist in driving financial insights, forecasting, reporting, and strategic analysis across the organization.



This is a work from home position ideal for a finance professional with strong modeling skills and experience supporting senior leadership.



Key Responsibilities

* Evaluate overall financial performance, including key drivers and KPIs

* Build, maintain, and enhance financial and sales models for budgeting, forecasting, and performance measurement

* Assist in establishing and maintaining financial dashboards for senior management and business partners

* Develop weekly, monthly, and quarterly productivity and realization reports across active engagements

* Manage and analyze the firm’s revenue pipeline (prospective, current, and won engagements) across multiple practice lines

* Conduct ad hoc financial analysis and provide actionable recommendations to address emerging business challenges

* Support the development and maintenance of 3-statement financial models for forecasting, M&A activities, and strategic investments



Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

* 5+ years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, corporate finance, or related role

* Strong experience with financial modeling, including 3-statement models

* Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and KPI tracking

* Advanced proficiency in Excel (required); experience with financial planning tools is a plus

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment and collaborate with cross-functional teams



Preferred Experience

* Experience supporting executive leadership

* Exposure to M&A analysis and strategic investment modeling

* Experience working with professional services firms or multi-practice organizations



If you're interested in applying, please send your application along with the requirements listed below:



Resume, screenshot of computer specifications, screenshot of internet speed test, and video recording where you introduce yourself and elaborate on your experiences. Thanks!

Key Responsibilities:

- Manage calendar, inbox, and communications

- Prioritize

title: SEO & Content Specialist | Ecommerce Agency
description:
We're a London-based Shopify ecommerce growth agency with a small team in the Philippines, looking for an SEO & Content Specialist to own organic search and content strategy across multiple client accounts and our own agency website.



You'll be responsible for technical SEO, on-page optimisation, content creation, and building organic visibility for ecommerce brands. We're ahead of the curve on GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation), optimising not just for Google but for AI search tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. You should be excited about where search is heading, not just where it's been.



What You'll Be Doing:



- Conducting technical SEO audits and implementing fixes across Shopify stores

- On-page optimisation (meta titles, descriptions, headings, internal linking, URL structure)

- Writing and optimising product descriptions, collection pages, blog posts, and landing page copy

- Implementing and maintaining schema markup (Product, FAQ, LocalBusiness, Organization, Article, etc.)

- Building and executing content strategies that drive organic traffic and conversions

- Keyword research and competitor analysis to identify content opportunities

- Optimising for GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation), structuring content so AI tools cite and surface our clients

- Writing SEO-optimised case studies, service pages, and location pages

- Managing Google Search Console, tracking rankings, and reporting on organic performance

- Optimising image alt text, file names, and page speed for SEO

- Building and managing backlink strategies (outreach, guest posts, digital PR)

- Collaborating with the web developer on technical SEO implementations

- Collaborating with the paid ads team to align organic and paid keyword strategies

- Using AI tools (Claude, Gemini) to accelerate content production, keyword research, and data analysis



What We're Looking For:



- Minimum 2 years hands-on SEO experience (case studies or rankings results required)

- Proven content writing ability, you can write blog posts, product copy, and landing pages that rank and convert

- Strong technical SEO knowledge (schema, site structure, crawlability, Core Web Vitals)

- Experience with Shopify SEO specifically

- Understanding of GEO and how AI search tools source and surface content

- Comfortable with keyword research tools and data analysis

- Experience building and executing content calendars

- Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

- Strong English communication (written, this role is heavily writing-focused)

- Available to work UK business hours (9am-5pm GMT)



Tools You Should Be Familiar With:



Required:

- Google Search Console

- Ahrefs or SEMrush

- Claude (Anthropic) or similar AI assistants for content and analysis

- Google AI Studio / Gemini

- Shopify (admin, blog, page editor, theme SEO settings)

- Google Sheets / Excel



Desirable:

- Surfer SEO or Clearscope (content optimisation)

- Screaming Frog (technical audits)

- Notion (task management, content calendars)

- Google Analytics 4

- Canva (blog graphics, featured images)

- Figma (content layout briefs)

- WordPress (bonus, but Shopify is the priority)

- Loom (screen recording for async communication)

- PageSpeed Insights / GTmetrix

- Schema markup generators and validators

- Perplexity, ChatGPT (understanding how AI search works from the user side)



Wage/Salary: PHP 40,000 - 70,000/mo (depending on experience)



About Us:



We're a lean, fast-moving agency that works with premium ecommerce brands across the UK. We already have a small team in the Philippines and are looking to grow. We value trust, ownership, and quality. You'll have direct access to the founder, clear briefs, and the tools you need to do great work.



Important: All company tools and software are provided strictly for client work only. Misuse of company resources for personal or external projects is grounds for immediate termination.



To Apply:



Please share examples of SEO results you've achieved, including rankings improvements, traffic growth, and the types of sites you've worked on. Send us a writing sample (blog post, product page, or landing page copy) and tell us your experience with schema markup and technical SEO. Bonus if you can show us content that ranks in AI search tools.

title: AI Tools & Operations Manager — American Political Strategy Firm
description:
LOVE WORKING WITH AI TOOLS

AND GROWING YOUR OPERATIONAL MANAGEMENT EXPERIENCE?



Work directly with an experienced American political strategist who is genuinely invested in your growth.

Build real, marketable skills in AI, digital marketing, SEO, political research, and operations management.



AI TOOLS DRIVE THIS ROLE

You’ll use Claude, Gemini, Google AI Studio, and NotebookLM as everyday professional tools. We want someone who follows AI developments the way others follow sports — keeping up with new features, watching tutorials, and reading release notes because they find it genuinely interesting, not because it’s required.

You don’t need to arrive knowing everything. You need to be curious, resourceful, and the kind of person who likes to figure things out. Many of these skills can be learned quickly using AI tools — and we’ll show you how.



AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITY

AI Tools and Knowledge Management

Organize AI research systems, help set up workflows in Google Workspace using AI tools, build prompt libraries, and stay current on new AI features and bring them to our work.



CRM and Workflow Automation

Manage and maintain our Zoho CRM — data cleanup, imports, and automated workflows. Experience with any major CRM is helpful; Zoho can be learned on the job.



Digital Advertising

Learn our digital advertising platform and help coordinate campaigns across social, streaming, and programmatic channels.



Data Analytics

Work with large databases — filtering, sorting, analyzing, and exporting data sets to support client campaigns. Training on our specific platforms provided.



SEO and Website

Competitive research, keyword updates, and website improvements using AI tools. No prior SEO experience required — if you know how to use AI, you can learn this quickly.



Business Development

Research political candidates, opponents, and markets — backgrounds, key issues, online presence, and campaign activity. Build prospect lists, monitor candidate announcements, and help identify where we should be growing.



Operations and Administration Management

Maintain a master task list for all active projects, handle invoicing and billing, supervise a small staff, and keep Google Workspace — Drive, Docs, and Sheets — organized.



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

You follow AI news and new tool releases on your own time — genuinely.

You like figuring things out on your own.

You keep things organized without being reminded.

You’re interested in U.S. politics or willing to learn about it.

You want to build skills in AI, marketing, and operations that will serve you for years.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

You need a predictable, rigid schedule.

You prefer to wait for direction rather than take initiative.

You’re not genuinely curious about AI and new technologies.



COMPENSATION

$6–$7 USD per hour, depending on experience

30–40 hours per week

Hours increase during peak election months

Profit split at end of each election cycle — in strong years, this has been a life-changing bonus

Professional AI tool subscriptions provided



QUALIFICATIONS

Excellent English, spoken and written

Demonstrated experience with AI tools used in real work — you’ve gone beyond basic prompting and actually organized, customized, or built something with AI

Data analytics experience — comfortable filtering, sorting, and working with large data sets

Strong Google Sheets, Docs, and Drive skills; full Google Workspace experience a plus

CRM and SEO experience helpful but not required

Available approximately 2–11 AM Philippine Time

Able to commit through November 2026, with the possibility to continue



RECENT GRADUATES WELCOME. Demonstrated AI curiosity and strong English matter more than years of experience.



ABOUT PRECISION POLITICS

American based Democratic political strategy and advertising firm. 400-plus campaign wins. 94% win rate. 24 National POLLIE Awards. You’ll work directly with the firm’s owner, a nationally recognized strategist and former Chief of Staff to a U.S. mayor.



HOW TO APPLY

Begin your subject line with the word OPERATIONS — this confirms that you read the posting and can follow directions.



ATTACH YOUR RESUME AND INCLUDE A COVER LETTER:

Why does this role interest you?

Why are you qualified for this position?

What relevant experience do you have from jobs, education, or independent projects?

Which AI tools do you use, and what have you built or organized with them?

What is the most recent AI feature or tool you discovered on your own?

Can you work between 2–11 AM Philippine Time on a regular basis?



FINALISTS WILL BE ASKED TO COMPLETE A SKILLS TEST.

English writing and editing

AI prompting and data extraction

Google Sheets and data cleaning

Research tasks

title: Bookkeeper / Finance Manager — Long-Term Part time position (2 Businesses, eCommerce + Agency)
description:
Overview



I'm an Irish founder based in Bali running two businesses and I need a sharp, reliable bookkeeper to keep my finances clean and put meaningful numbers in front of me every week — not just at tax time. This is a long-term retainer role for someone who actually gives a sh*t about small business finance and can communicate clearly and proactively.



The two businesses



Beyond the Fold (BTF)



Branded CRO & design agency. Retainer-based B2B clients. Revenue in GBP/EUR/USD. Expenses: contractor fees, software, ads.



Digestly



DTC eCommerce supplement brand (UK market). Shopify-based. Revenue in GBP. Expenses: inventory, testing, ads, fulfilment.



What I need from you



Monthly bookkeeping for both businesses — P&L, cash flow, balance sheet reconciled and sent to me in a clear, clean format



Weekly KPI summary every Friday — sent to me via WhatsApp as a concise, scannable message (not a PDF, not an
 — WhatsApp, short, punchy numbers)



Flag anything that looks off — cash flow issues, unusual expenses, margins drifting — before I ask



Keep both books separate and clean — different revenue models, different expense structures, different currencies



Be reachable and responsive — I move fast and I need someone who does too



Ideal background



Experience with DTC eCommerce bookkeeping (Shopify, COGS, inventory, ad spend reconciliation)



Comfortable with agency/service business financials alongside product-based businesses



UK-aware (VAT, UK filing standards) — Digestly is a UK market business



Proficient in Xero or QuickBooks (state which you prefer)



Multi-currency experience (GBP, EUR, USD, IDR)



Strong communicator — plain English, no jargon unless I ask



The role



Type



Long-term retainer



Budget



Commitment



Monthly + weekly cadence



To apply — answer these three questions



Keep it brief. I read every response and I will not open generic proposals.



1.



What questions would you ask me to set up the books for both businesses — list them out



2.



Write me a sample Friday WhatsApp KPI message for either business — show me what I'd actually receive



3.



What accounting software would you use and why for this setup specifically

title: Remote Executive Operations Assistant
description:
Remote Executive Operations Assistant (Full-Time, Long-Term Role)



About the Role

We are a fast-growing private healthcare business based in the United Kingdom, specialising in advanced dentistry including implants, smile makeovers and cosmetic treatments.

We operate using structured systems, dashboards and performance tracking, and we are building towards becoming a multi-site organisation.



We are looking for a highly organised, detail-oriented Remote Executive Operations Assistant to support leadership with reporting workflows, operational coordination, and executive support tasks.

This is a long-term position with the opportunity to grow into a more senior operations support role as the business expands 



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Reporting Support (Primary Focus)

You will help maintain the accuracy and consistency of business reporting systems by:

Updating structured KPI dashboards in Google Sheets

Maintaining internal tracking systems for treatment coordination and marketing performance

Preparing daily and weekly summary reports

Reviewing data for accuracy and flagging inconsistencies

Supporting reporting workflows used by leadership for decision-making

Monitoring follow-up pipelines and highlighting outstanding actions where required

Accuracy and attention to detail are essential in this area of the role.

Executive Support Responsibilities

You will provide structured administrative support to the clinic directors, including:

Managing renewals and compliance-related deadlines (e.g. insurance, servicing schedules)

Researching and coordinating travel arrangements

Monitoring subscriptions and service accounts

Organising and prioritising
 communications where required

Preparing and formatting documents, summaries and reports

Tracking upcoming tasks and proactively flagging actions needed

This part of the role helps reduce leadership workload and improve operational efficiency.

Personal Brand Coordination (Light Social Media Support)

You may also assist with coordination of personal professional Instagram accounts by:

Organising and scheduling content from existing materials

Preparing captions or formatting posts

Supporting posting consistency

Tracking engagement trends where relevant

This is a coordination role rather than a creative marketing role.



Candidate Requirements

We are looking for someone who is:

highly detail-oriented and accurate

organised and proactive in managing tasks

comfortable working with Google Sheets daily

confident communicating in written English

reliable and consistent in following structured processes

able to handle confidential business information professionally

interested in a long-term position within a growing organisation



Preferred (but not required):

experience supporting executives or leadership teams

experience maintaining dashboards or tracking systems

experience working with CRM platforms

experience supporting healthcare or professional service businesses

Working Structure



Full-time role (40 hours per week)

Long-term position

Partial overlap with UK working hours required

Structured onboarding and clearly defined responsibilities

Opportunity to grow with the organisation as it expands



Why Join This Role

This position offers:

long-term stability

clear expectations and structured systems

professional leadership environment

involvement in operational decision-support workflows

opportunity to develop into a senior remote operations support role over time ????

title: E-Commerce Video Editor
description:
Quick Summary

Daily Output: 3–4 concepts (30–90 seconds each)



Focus: Ultra-realistic AI product b-roll & talking characters



Location: Remote



About the Role

We are looking for a High-Volume AI Video Editor who can operate at the intersection of creative storytelling and cutting-edge technology. This is not a traditional "trimming" role; you will be responsible for prompting and generating entire scenes from scratch. You must be able to produce 3 to 4 finished video concepts per day that look like they were shot in a million-dollar studio.



Key Responsibilities

Rapid Concepting: Produce 3–4 unique video concepts daily, ranging from 30 to 90 seconds.



AI Product Cinematography: Generate ultra-realistic b-roll of product packaging with perfect lighting, textures, and fluid camera movements.



AI Character Creation: Build and animate hyper-realistic talking characters with seamless lip-syncing and emotive performance.



End-to-End Editing: Handle all prompting, upscaling, color grading, sound design, and final assembly.



Required Technical Stack

You must be an expert in the following tools to hit our daily output goals:



Video Generation: Runway Gen-3/Gen-4, Luma Dream Machine, or Kling.



Character/Voice: HeyGen (Avatar/Lip-sync), ElevenLabs (Voice), and D-ID.



Image/Product Gen: Midjourney (v6+) and Leonardo.ai (for consistent product styles).



Editing/Post-Production: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Desktop.



AI Enhancement: Topaz Video AI (for upscaling and cleaning AI artifacts).



Requirements

Speed: Ability to turn a concept into a polished video in under 2 hours.



Eye for Realism: You know how to spot and fix "AI-jank" (glitches, weird limbs, or unnatural lighting).



Proactive: You stay up-to-date with the weekly changes in the AI video landscape.



How to Apply

Provide a link to your portfolio or a folder of your best AI-generated video work (specifically product b-roll and talking characters).



List the AI tools you are currently paying for or use most frequently.



Application Requirement: To prove you have high attention to detail, please start your cover letter or subject line with the secret word: NEURAL.



LEVEL OF AI EDITING AND B-ROLL CREATION NEEDED :
