title: Data Analyst & Reporting Specialist | Ecommerce Agency
description:
We're a London-based Shopify ecommerce growth agency with a growing team in the Philippines, looking for a Data Analyst & Reporting Specialist to own cross-channel analytics, reporting, and business intelligence across multiple client accounts.



We have dedicated specialists running Google Ads, Meta/TikTok Ads, Klaviyo, SEO, and Shopify for our clients. What we need is someone who connects all of that data into a single clear picture. You'll build the dashboards, track the numbers, spot the trends, and make sure every client and every tea
mber has the data they need to make better decisions.



This role is central to how we operate. We sell data-driven growth, and you're the person who makes sure the data is clean, accurate, and actionable.



What You'll Be Doing:



Reporting & Dashboards:

- Building and maintaining client-facing reporting dashboards in Looker Studio

- Pulling data from Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Klaviyo, Shopify, and Google Analytics into unified reports

- Creating branded Sabre Digital dashboard templates that can be scaled across clients

- Producing weekly and monthly performance reports with clear insights and recommendations

- Building internal dashboards for the team to track KPIs across all client accounts

- Automating reporting workflows wherever possible to reduce manual work



Analytics & Insights:

- Tracking cross-channel attribution and understanding how paid, organic,
, and direct traffic work together

- Analysing campaign performance data to identify winning channels, audiences, and creatives

- Spotting trends, anomalies, and opportunities that individual channel specialists might miss

- Conducting deep-dive analyses on CVR, AOV, LTV, CAC, and other ecommerce metrics

- Supporting the team with data for client strategy calls and proposals

- Benchmarking client performance against industry standards



Data Management:

- Setting up and auditing Google Analytics 4 configurations across client stores

- Managing Google Tag Manager implementations and conversion tracking

- Ensuring data accuracy across all platforms (pixel setup, UTM tracking, attribution settings)

- Building and maintaining spreadsheet models for forecasting, budgeting, and scenario planning

- Cleaning and structuring raw data exports for analysis

- Documenting data sources, definitions, and reporting methodologies



What We're Looking For:



- Minimum 2 years experience in data analytics, reporting, or business intelligence (agency or ecommerce experience strongly preferred)

- Strong experience building dashboards in Looker Studio (Google Data Studio)

- Deep understanding of Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager

- Comfortable working with data from multiple ad platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads)

- Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, formulas, data modelling)

- Understanding of ecommerce metrics and what drives profitable growth

- Ability to translate raw data into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders

- Detail-oriented with a focus on data accuracy

- Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

- Strong English communication (written)

- Available to work UK business hours (9am-5pm GMT)



Tools You Should Be Familiar With:



Required:

- Looker Studio (dashboard building, data blending)

- Google Analytics 4

- Google Tag Manager

- Google Ads (understanding campaign data and metrics)

- Meta Ads Manager (understanding campaign data and metrics)

- Google Sheets / Excel (advanced)

- Claude (Anthropic) or similar AI tools for data analysis and automation



Desirable:

- Shopify Analytics (understanding store data, sales reports, customer data)

- Klaviyo (understanding
/SMS performance data)

- TikTok Ads Manager

- BigQuery or SQL (for advanced data queries)

- Supermetrics, 
, or similar data connectors

- Notion (documentation, task management)

- Python or Apps Script (for data automation)

- Google AI Studio / Gemini

- Ahrefs or SEMrush (SEO data)

- Hotjar or Microsoft Clarity (behavioural analytics)

- Power BI or Tableau (alternative dashboarding)



WAGE/SALARY: PHP 40,000 - 70,000/mo (depending on experience)



About Us:



We're a lean, fast-moving agency that works with premium ecommerce brands across the UK. We have a growing team in the Philippines covering web dev, paid ads, retention, SEO, social media, UGC, and project management. Data is at the heart of everything we do. We need someone who can take the raw output from all of those channels and turn it into the intelligence that drives our clients' growth.



Important: All company tools and software are provided strictly for client work only. Misuse of company resources for personal or external projects is grounds for immediate termination.



To Apply:



Please share examples of dashboards you've built (Looker Studio preferred), including the data sources used and how the dashboards informed decision-making. Tell us about your experience with GA4 and GTM setup, and which ecommerce platforms you've worked with. Bonus if you can show how you've used AI tools to speed up your analytics workflow.

title: Senior Creative Designer / Art Director
description:
About Us



We're a small growing creative agency working with CPG brands. We handle their entire creative production: branding, print and digital campaigns, e-commerce visuals, social media assets, AI-powered content, and more.



We work as an embedded creative team, delivering high-quality work through a streamlined Kanban workflow with fast turnarounds.



We're currently 2 (myself and a graphic designer) and looking to grow the team. Preference for CET-compatible timezones.



The Role



We are looking for a Senior Creative Designer with strong art direction skills. You will focus on creative execution: designing, producing, and polishing high-quality assets across branding, print, digital, and AI-powered workflows.



We need someone with 5 to 10 years of experience in graphic design, art direction, or creative production. You take ownership of your work, check every detail, and deliver assets that are ready to go live without supervision.



You will receive briefs from the team lead or directly from clients if proven communication ability, and focus on producing excellent creative work. Communication happens internally via Discord and Linear.



What You Will Do



Brand Identity & Print Design: Create and refine logos, brand identities, and visual systems. Design retail advertising (posters, POS, flyers, business cards), product catalogs, lookbooks, and packaging layouts. You must be comfortable preparing print-ready files following printer requirements (bleeds, trim marks, color standards). Build 360 web campaigns for product launches and brand activations, with strong knowledge of common web ratios and standards.



Digital & Campaign Design: Design ad creatives, social media assets,
 templates, e-commerce product pages, and banner kits. Ensure all visuals are on-brand, properly sized, and conversion-focused.



AI Visual Production: Use AI-powered tools to generate product lifestyle scenes, virtual try-ons, UGC-style content, product video sequences, and high-volume creative variations. Write effective prompts and work with generative image and video models (Runway, Kling, Flux, Nano Banana, Vemo, Seedance, etc.). Experience with Freepik Space for AI campaign production (outfit generation, scene building, content creation) is a big plus. If you haven't used this specific tool, you must be the type of person who learns new tools on a regular basis. This is a fast-paced, constantly evolving industry.



Quality Control: This is one of the most important parts of the job. You proofread every single text. You verify every dimension. You check every alignment. You make sure the deliverable matches the brief exactly. You re-check your own work multiple times before anything goes out. If you are not naturally obsessive about details, this role is not for you.



Required Skills



- Expert-level Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign. Figma is used for teamwork and presentations but no special experience is required.

- Hands-on experience with AI image/video generation. Strong prompting skills. Familiarity with generative models and AI creative workflows.

- Strong eye for composition, typography, color, and layout. Knowledge of photography principles. Natural affinity with fashion, lifestyle, and consumer brand aesthetics.

- Obsessive about accuracy. Typos, misaligned elements, and wrong dimensions are unacceptable to you.

- Professional English (written).



Nice to Have



Experience working with fashion, footwear, or CPG brands. Portfolio showing retail advertising, campaign visuals, or AI-generated brand content. Experience with UGC content creation or AI campaign production pipelines (e.g. Freepik Space). Motion design or short-form video editing skills. Knowledge of no-code website builders such as Framer or Webflow.



What We Provide



All software licenses: Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, AI tools, and platform subscriptions. You work on your own computer. This is a long-term, stable position with a growing agency. You will work directly with the founder and creative director, who has 20+ years of experience in art direction for global brands.



SSS, PhilHealth, and Pag-IBIG contributions covered. 13th month pay included.



How to Apply



Send your portfolio link and a short message explaining why this role is a good fit for you. Include examples of AI-generated visuals or campaign work if you have them. We value quality of work over length of CV.

title: Crypto Alpha Research & Chart Designer
description:

Using the right colors, the right timeframe, the right indicators, and the right chart positioning. Every chart should feel like a piece of art.



Think of it as being a graphic designer, but specifically for financial charts.





The second priority is alpha. You should always stay on top of the latest market alpha. Follow all the top accounts, catch alpha early from smaller accounts, and recreate charts in your own original way, but better.





Focus Areas: Bitcoin, Stocks, Gold, Oil, and occasionally Altcoins.





The Formula:

Visually Attractive Chart + Great Alpha + Being First/Quick = Going Viral



Going viral is the end goal. The formula above is the process. You should have mastered every step of it.





Before You Apply:

- Check our X 

- Ask yourself: can you redesign these charts and make them even better?

- You must have experience in crypto

- You must have a strong eye for design

- You must be hardworking and fast

title: Executive Assistant & Social Media Manager
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and self-motivated Executive Assistant & Social Media Manager to provide support to our team remotely. Play a crucial role in assisting with various administrative tasks, ensuring smooth operations, and enabling efficient communication within the organization. The ideal candidate is proactive, detail-oriented, and possesses excellent communication and time management skills.



Responsibilities:



Administrative Support:

Manage and maintain schedules, appointments, and calendars for team members.

Coordinate, schedule, and moderate meetings, conference calls, and video conferences.

Prepare meeting agendas, take minutes, and distribute them to attendees.

Handle incoming and outgoing correspondence, including
s, letters, and phone calls.

Organize and maintain digital and physical documents and files.



Travel and Event Coordination:

Arrange travel itineraries and reservations, including flights, accommodations, and ground transportation.

Research and book venues for meetings, events, and conferences.

Assist in preparing materials and logistics for events or presentations.



Data Entry and Research:

Perform accurate data entry and maintenance of databases, spreadsheets, and other records.

Conduct online research on various topics as directed, providing summarized findings and reports.



Communication and correspondence:

Manage
 accounts and respond to inquiries in a timely and professional manner.

Draft, proofread, and format correspondence, reports, and other documents.

Assist in preparing and distributing internal announcements and communications.



Task and Project Management:

Organize and prioritize tasks, ensuring deadlines are met and projects are completed efficiently.

Assist in coordinating and tracking project progress, deliverables, and milestones.

Collaborate with team members to ensure smooth workflow and effective communication.



Social Media Management:

Must have knowledge of IG, TT, FB, Meta & Google Ads, ChatGPT, Claude, and AI platforms.

Must be able to provide detailed reports explaining how conversations are created from ads.

Must be able to source and create content.



Digital Tools and Software:

Utilize various digital tools and software for effective communication and task management.

Maintain proficiency in virtual collaboration tools, such as project management software, video conferencing platforms, and file-sharing systems.



Additional Support:

Provide social media and general administrative support as needed, including expense tracking, invoice processing, and supply management.





Qualifications and Skills:

Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant or similar administrative role.

Proven has already scaled accounts past 10k/month.

Strong organizational and time management skills with the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Proficiency in using digital tools and software for virtual collaboration and communication.

High level of professionalism and discretion in handling confidential information.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy.

Ability to work independently and manage workload with minimal supervision.

Flexibility and adaptability to changing priorities and tasks.

Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.



Education and Experience:

High school diploma or equivalent required; additional certification in office administration or related field is a plus.

Previous experience as an Administrative Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or similar role is preferred.

Previous experience as a Social Media Manager, or similar role is preferred.

Proficiency in using tools such as Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), Google Workspace, and Quickbooks

Familiarity with project management tools and software is a plus.



This job description is intended to provide information and scope of the role. It is not intended to be an exhaustive list of responsibilities, duties, or qualifications required. SN reserves the right to modify or revise this job description as needed. The selected candidate will start full-time. Benefits will increase with performance over time.

title: UGC Content Manager
description:
REAL MAD HONEY — UGC Content Manager



Also referred to as: Creator Partnerships Manager

Remote · Full-Time · Reports to: Head of Creative Strategy



Real Mad Honey is a premium DTC brand selling wild Himalayan mad honey, sourced by hand at 3,500+ meters and third-party tested for purity. We've served 50,000+ customers and we're growing fast.





RESPONSIBILITIES



UGC Production

- Source creators that fit the brand across Backstage, Upwork, Fiverr, X, TikTok, and Instagram.

- Run casting calls, handle outreach, negotiate rates, and process agreements.

- Guide creators through shoots remotely as the point of contact for the entire production. Think of yourself as a Creative Director.

- Review incoming footage for quality and brief compliance before it goes to the editor.

- Manage timelines and keep production moving without things needing to be chased.



Barter Collaborations

- Identify creators suited for barter arrangements where we ship the honey in exchange for organic content.

- Own the full barter process from outreach to content collection.

- Track the impact of the barter collaborations.



Paid Influencer Partnerships (TikTok and Instagram)

- Find creators with the right audience fit, engagement quality, and content style for paid collabs.

- Handle all creator communications from first contact through final delivery.

- Share briefs prepared by the Creative Strategist and make sure creators understand and execute them correctly.

- Negotiate rates, track deliverables, and flag anything that's going off track.



Supporting the Team

- Help the Social Media Manager source creators when needed.

- Stay aligned with weekly campaign priorities from the Creative Strategy team.





SKILLS & EXPERIENCE



- Hands-on experience with UGC sourcing or creator management, ideally in a DTC or e-commerce context.

- Comfortable working across Backstage, Upwork, Fiverr, X, TikTok, and Instagram to find the right talent.

- Experience supporting paid ads teams and understanding how UGC feeds into performance creative.

- Strong eye for content quality — you can tell what will perform and what won't.

- Excellent written English for outreach, negotiations, and creator briefs.

- Organized across multiple timelines, multiple creators, and multiple campaigns simultaneously.

- Familiar with Google Workspace, Notion, and Trello or similar tools.

- Video editing or graphic design experience is a plus.





MUST HAVES



- Straight to the point communicator. No long confusing instructions. You know how to brief a creator clearly, build a real working relationship with them, and keep things moving without hand-holding.

- Proactive. You don't wait to be told. If something needs doing, you do it.

- Integrity. We are a fully remote team and we run on trust. If something goes wrong, we need to hear it from you first.

- Constructive with feedback. You can take direction, apply it, and improve without making it personal.

- Growth mindset. This is not a clock-in, clock-out role. We want someone invested in outcomes, not just tasks. We don't track time. We track deliverables.

- Strong negotiator. You know how to get good rates without burning creator relationships.

- This must be your only job. Full commitment, full presence.





WHO WILL THRIVE HERE



Someone who takes initiative before being asked, communicates like a real person, and genuinely cares about the quality of what gets made. You'll be the main point of contact for a lot of creators, so how you show up in those relationships matters. Clear, honest, and dependable goes a long way here.



HOW TO APPLY



Send your resume along with a short note on your experience with UGC sourcing and creator management. Include any examples of creators or campaigns you've worked on.



Once I've reviewed your application, qualified candidates will receive a short test assignment fro
. This test is a required step before moving forward in the process.



We read everything. Real applications only — copy-paste responses will be ignored.



Real Mad Honey ·

title: QA Tester (Web Platform – Frontend, Admin, Affiliate)
description:
Job Overview:

We are looking for a detail-oriented QA Tester to perform end-to-end testing of a web-based platform. This includes user-facing websites, backend admin systems, and partner/affiliate systems.

You will follow structured test cases to identify bugs, inconsistencies, and usability issues. This role is suitable for candidates who are organized, responsible, and able to follow processes carefully.



Scope of Work:

1. Frontend Website Testing (User Side)

• Account registration / login / logout 

• Payment flows (deposit / withdrawal simulations) 

• Rewards and promotion features 

• Content display (banners, popups, campaigns) 

• UI/UX consistency across desktop and mobile 

• General navigation and usability 



2. Admin System Testing

• User management (view, edit, status control) 

• Configuration settings validation 

• Rewards and incentive setup verification 

• Reports and transaction history accuracy 

• Access control and permissions testing 



3. Affiliate / Partner System Testing

• Partner account registration and login 

• Tracking link validation 

• Conversion and reporting accuracy 

• Multi-region / multi-currency behavior (if applicable) 



Responsibilities:

• Execute predefined test cases step-by-step 

• Record test results clearly (Pass / Fail with evidence) 

• Capture screenshots and screen recordings for issues 

• Report bugs in a structured format: 

o Steps to reproduce 

o Expected result 

o Actual result 

• Perform regression testing after fixes 

• Identify inconsistencies across different parts of the system 

• Verify data consistency between frontend and backend 



Requirements:

• Strong attention to detail and patience 

• Ability to follow instructions strictly 

• Basic understanding of websites and user flows 

• Experience in QA testing is a plus (not required) 

• Familiarity with Excel / Google Sheets 

• Clear written English communication 



Tools You Will Use:

• Chrome browser 

• Google Sheets / Excel 

• Screenshot / screen recording tools 

• Communication tools (e.g., Slack /
) 



Work Structure:

• Part-time or full-time (flexible) 

• Task-based assignments with clear instructions 

• Daily or weekly reporting 



Sample Task (for Screening):

You may be asked to:

1. Create a test account 

2. Complete a payment flow 

3. Trigger a promotion or reward 

4. Report any issues with screenshots 



How to Apply:

Please include:

1. Your QA or testing experience (if any) 

2. Your internet speed 

3. Your available working hours

4. A short example of how you would report a bug

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Media buyer - Facebook ad specialist
description:
Media Buyer – Pressure Washing Marketing Agency



About the role:



We are a marketing agency that runs Meta ads for pressure washing businesses across the US. We currently manage 14 clients and are growing. We are looking for a reliable media buyer to handle the day-to-day execution of our clients' ad campaigns.

You do NOT need to write ad copy, scripts, or strategy. We provide all the scripts. Your job is to edit the video creatives using the voiceovers and footage we provide, upload them to the client's ad account, launch the ads, monitor performance based on leads generated, and report daily.



This is a flexible remote role. Workload varies day to day — some days are light monitoring, others involve editing and launching. Estimated 5–8 hours per day on average across all clients.



What you will do:



- Edit video ad creatives for each client using raw footage and voiceovers we provide (captions, cuts, music, branding)

- Upload creatives to the client's ad account and launch campaigns in Meta Ads Manager

- Check each client's ads every day and monitor performance

- Edit and update live campaigns based on instructions (audience, budget, copy)

- Report back to the agency owner daily with a simple performance update

- Flag any issues, disapprovals, or drops in performance immediately



Requirements



- Proven hands-on experience with Meta Ads — must have managed at least $10,000 in total ad spend

- Solid video editing skills — able to edit short-form video ads (captions, cuts, transitions, music)

- Familiar with campaign structure: campaigns, ad sets, and ads

- Knows how to set up audiences, budgets, placements, and objectives

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive in communication

- Comfortable managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Strong written English communication



Pay:



- $100–$150 per client per month depending on performance and reliability. You will start with a small number of clients and grow as you prove yourself. Top performers managing 10+ clients can earn $1,000–$1,500/month and more.





How to apply:



Click the link below and complete the application form. The form will ask you to submit your Loom intro video.







Applicants who submit a generic video or do not complete the form will not be considered.

description:

About the Role



We’re looking for a Shopify Product Management Specialist to join our growing team.



This is a full-time, long-term role for someone based in the Philippines who is comfortable working Australian business hours (AEST).



You’ll take ownership of our Shopify store—making sure everything is accurate, organised, and ready to sell. Your work will directly support our sales team, helping them focus on closing deals instead of fixing product or stock issues.



If you’re someone who takes pride in clean, accurate work and enjoys managing the details behind a high-performing store, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



 Product Management

Inventory Management

Store Organisation

Manage collections, tags, metafields, variants, and filters

Team Support

Work closely with the sales team (phone &
)

What We’re Looking For

Must-Have Skills

Strong experience with Shopify (admin-level confidence)

High attention to detail (product data, pricing, images, stock)

Ability to work independently and manage your own tasks

Clear communication in a remote team environment



Nice to Have

Experience with Google Sheets or Excel (inventory tracking)

Basic photo editing or image resizing for web



Why Join Us?

? Long-term, stable role

? Clear responsibilities and ownership

? Supportive and remote-friendly team

? Opportunity to grow with the business





How to Apply

Submit your CV via OnlineJobs.ph

Include a short note about your Shopify experience



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to:

, Instagram, etc.)

 & SMS Marketing Platforms – Advanced

Named after Chef Aaron Lee’s grandmother Winnie and CEO Mallory Gott’s great-grandmother Ethel, the restaurant is built on warmth, hospitality, and community.

title: Wordpress Developer [Full Stack]
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced Senior WordPress Full Stack Developer to join our growing team. In this role, you will lead end-to-end development of complex WordPress-based web applications, from database architecture and server-side logic to custom themes, plugins, and front-end interfaces.

You will collaborate closely with designers, project managers, and stakeholders to deliver scalable, high-performance digital solutions. The ideal candidate is self-driven, detail-oriented, and passionate about clean, maintainable code.



Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and maintain custom WordPress themes and plugins from scratch

- Build and integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services (payment gateways, CRMs, etc.)

- Develop responsive, cross-browser compatible front-end interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript

- Architect and optimize MySQL databases for performance and scalability

- Manage and configure web hosting environments (cPanel, Linux servers, Nginx/Apache)

- Implement security best practices, including WordPress hardening and vulnerability patching

- Conduct code reviews and provide technical mentorship to junior developers

- Collaborate with UI/UX teams to translate wireframes into fully functional pages

- Optimize website performance including Core Web Vitals, page speed, and caching strategies

- Manage version control using Git and participate in CI/CD workflows

- Troubleshoot and resolve bugs, performance issues, and compatibility conflicts

- Document technical specifications, development processes, and API integrations



Required Qualifications

- Minimum 5 years of hands-on WordPress development experience

- Strong proficiency in PHP (OOP), JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3/SASS

- Deep understanding of WordPress core, hooks, filters, the WP REST API, and WP-CLI

- Experience with popular page builders (Elementor, Divi, Gutenberg/Block Editor)

- Proficiency with MySQL — query optimization, stored procedures, and schema design

- Solid experience with React.js or Vue.js for modern front-end development

- Familiarity with Node.js and headless/decoupled WordPress architectures

- Strong command of Git, GitHub/GitLab, and collaborative branching workflows

- Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, or DigitalOcean

- Knowledge of SEO best practices and technical SEO implementation

- Proven ability to work independently and deliver projects on schedule



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with WooCommerce development, customizations, and payment gateway integrations

- Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, or containerized development environments

- Knowledge of GraphQL and headless CMS setups (e.g., WPGraphQL + Next.js)

- Experience with Multisite WordPress installations and management

- Background in Agile/Scrum development methodologies

- Contributions to open-source WordPress themes or plugins

- Experience with testing frameworks (PHPUnit, Jest, Cypress)



How to Apply:

Fill this form:

title: Product Lister / Product Activator (Shopify + Google Shopping) — Full-Time Remote
description:
We’re hiring a Product Lister / Product Activator to review, clean, and activate products in Shopify for Google Shopping readiness.



This is a high-volume execution role: you’ll process 300+ products per day (one-by-one), ensuring each product is correctly set up and compliant.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Shopify Product Activation (Daily)



Review and activate 300+ products/day inside Shopify



Check variants: correct images per variant, correct pricing, correct options (size/color), no missing data



Verify product descriptions: correct structure, no misleading claims, no missing info



Ensure product is in the right collection(s), has the right tags, and uses the right template



Check titles, product type, vendor, and other Shopify fields for consistency



Fix errors fast and keep everything organized



Google Shopping Readiness



Ensure products are structured correctly for Google Shopping feeds (clean titles, correct categories/product types, attributes where relevant)



Identify issues that can cause disapprovals (wrong images, mismatched variants, unclear description, policy risk)



AI Images (IMPORTANT)



Generate new AI product images for newly added products when needed



Optimize/improve existing images (quality, background cleanup, clarity, consistency across the store)



Ensure images meet e-commerce best practices (clean, high quality, product clearly visible, variant accuracy)



Important : Please if you read the full description , mention : Activator in your Subject 



STRICT REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON’T MEET THESE)



Proven experience with Shopify product listing (bulk and manual work)



Proven experience with Google Shopping product listing / feed readiness



Able to handle high volume (300+ products/day) with accuracy



Strong attention to detail (you catch mistakes others miss)



Experience using AI tools to generate/optimize product images (e.g., Canva, Photoshop, AI image generators, background removers, upscalers, etc.)



Reliable internet + stable computer



Bonus:

Experience working in dropshipping / multi-store environments

PLEASE READ CAREFULLY 



We’re hiring an experienced Disputes & Chargebacks Team Lead to own and optimize our chargeback/dispute operations across multiple payment processors. You will manage day-to-day case strategy, improve SOPs, lead a small team, and drive measurable improvements in win rate and dispute ratio.



You’ll be responsible for keeping our payment operations healthy, reducing financial loss, and building repeatable systems that scale.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1) Disputes Execution & Strategy



Handle chargebacks/disputes end-to-end across Stripe, PayPal, Shopify Payments (and other processors when needed)



Build strong evidence packages: order proof, tracking proof, customer communication logs, product pages, policies, IP/device data (when available), etc.



Ensure on-time submissions and compliance with each processor’s timelines and rules



Write high-quality rebuttals and structured dispute responses that improve win rates



2) Process & SOP Ownership



Build and maintain private SOPs per processor (Stripe vs PayPal vs Shopify Payments rules differ)



Create playbooks by dispute reason code (fraud, not received, not as described, refund not processed, etc.)



Implement standard templates, tagging rules, escalation flows, and evidence checklists



3) Analytics & Performance Management



Produce weekly reporting: win rate, dispute ratio, top dispute reasons, loss drivers, recurring patterns



Identify root causes (shipping delays, unclear product expectations, policy gaps, CX quality issues) and coordinate fixes with the CX/Operations team



Continuously improve KPIs and prevent repeat dispute patterns



4) Team Leadership (Hands-on)



Hire support/disputes agents (Philippines preferred) and train them



Run quality control: audit cases, correct mistakes, coach agents, and enforce SOP compliance



Create training materials and ensure consistent dispute handling at scale



STRICT REQUIREMENTS (READ CAREFULLY)



Do NOT apply if you do not meet ALL of the following:



You have personally handled at least 200–300 chargebacks/disputes end-to-end (not just “assisted”)



You can demonstrate a minimum win rate of 60%+ (or provide proof/results from past role)



Strong working experience with Stripe + PayPal (Shopify Payments is a big plus)



You understand dispute timelines, evidence standards, reason codes, and how processors evaluate cases



You are highly organized and can manage high-volume environments without missing deadlines



Excellent written English — clear, direct, professional rebuttals



Nice to have (bonus):



Shopify admin knowledge (order timelines, fulfillment, policies, customer notes, tags)



Experience improving dispute ratio through operational improvements (shipping, policy clarity, CX scripts)



Prior team lead or manager experience in dispute/risk ops



WORK SETUP



Independent Contractor (remote)



Full-time: 8 hours/day, 40 hours/week



Flexible schedule, but you must meet deadlines and be responsive



We require Hubstaff time tracking: 



COMPENSATION



Hourly rate based on proven experience and results



Performance incentives possible (based on win rate, dispute ratio improvement, team output/quality)



APPLICATION PROCESS (STRICT FILTER)



To apply, send the answers below. Applications without these will be ignored.



How many disputes/chargebacks have you personally handled end-to-end? (number)



What is your historical win rate? Provide proof/screenshot or a breakdown by processor if possible.



Which processors have you worked with? (Stripe, PayPal, Shopify Payments, others)



What are the top 3 dispute reason codes you handled most, and how did you win them?



Describe your evidence checklist for “Item Not Received” and “Fraud/Unauthorized”.



Have you ever built SOPs and trained agents? If yes, explain briefly.



What is your hourly rate expectation?



Optional practical test (shortlisted):

We may send 3 sample cases to draft rebuttals for (paid test for shortlisted candidates).

title: AI UGC Video Editor (Direct Response Ads)
description:
Important: This role is strictly for candidates with proven video editing skills for Lead Generation ads / UGC style content experience. If you do not have hands-on experience with AI for avatar generation and video editing, please do not apply.



• Proficiency in CapCut (+2 years experience)

• Strong experience editing short-form UGC videos (TikTok / Reels / Ads)

• Familiarity with HeyGen or AI that generates avatars

• Understanding of direct response marketing and sales funnels



About Click Crew Media:



Click Crew Media is a performance-driven advertising agency based in Amsterdam. We focus on scaling profitable campaigns through a combination of in-house technology, data-driven decision-making, and creative execution.

You will be part of building a scalable UGC video system from the ground up, with direct impact on what works and what scales.



About the Role:



This is not just video editing. We create performance-driven creatives. Your goal is to produce videos that capture attention, increase CTR, and drive conversions.



As a UGC Video Editor, you will receive tasks with clear briefs for the short-form videos requested for the week. Turnaround time is critical. You should be comfortable with:

• Same-day revisions when needed

• Fast iteration cycles based on feedback 



You will:



• Use AI tools for avatar creation and voiceovers

• Edit short-form videos using CapCut, including captions, sound design, B-roll, and visual effects

• Work with Asana and Slack to be in communication with the team and task-tracking

• Test creatives, funnels, angles, and structures continuously

• Open to learning and experimenting with new tools and AI software

• Create attention-grabbing hooks

• Create 10 videos per week (minimum)



About You:

• Strong proficiency in CapCut or similar tools 

• Familiarity with HeyGen or AI avatar generation

• Can work independently in a remote setup

• Always willing to improve and evolve as the processes change

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment where speed and iteration matter more than perfection





What We Offer

• Starting with 8 hours per week, freelance agreement (The expectation of hours will increase with the expansion of the project)

• $ 8/hr

• Long-term collaboration

• Access to paid tools and software



How to Apply:

To confirm you have read this carefully, start your application with:

“I have AI avatar generation experience - here is one example I created: (add link for preview).”



Applications without this will not be considered.

Submit your resume along with details of your relevant experience.

title: Ebook / PDF Guide Designer — Health & Wellness Brand
description:
About the Project

I’m a licensed acupuncturist and physical therapist with a large social media following (950K+ on Instagram). I’m launching a paid digital guide, a 50-60 page PDF guide.

I already have everything you need: the full written content (Word doc, 20 chapters), point location photos, an existing 16-page freebie lead magnet PDF that serves as the design reference/template, and video links to embed.

Your job is to take all of that and turn it into a polished, professional, designed PDF that matches the look and feel of my existing freebie guide.



What You’ll Be Working With

• A complete Word document with all 20 chapters written and organized

• Point location photos (I’ll provide these: similar style to the freebie)

• An existing 16-page PDF freebie, but make it aesthetically awesome

• YouTube/Instagram video links to embed/hyperlink within the PDF

• Brand colors, fonts, and logo already established



What You’ll Do

• Design and lay out a 50-60 page PDF ebook in Canva or Adobe InDesign

• Upgrade the design style of my existing freebie PDF (I’ll send this to you)

• Place all photos with point markers in the correct locations

• Insert clickable hyperlinks for YouTube/Instagram video demos and social media links

• Create a printable daily tracker table (template already exists in the freebie)

• Design a cover page and table of contents

• Export final file as a high-quality PDF ready for digital sale

• Provide the editable Canva/InDesign source file so I can make minor updates later



Requirements

• Strong portfolio of ebook, PDF guide, or digital product design (please share examples)

• Experience in Canva Pro and/or Adobe InDesign

• Clean, modern design sense — not cluttered, not overly decorated

• Attention to detail with text formatting, alignment, and photo placement

• Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines

• Experience with health, wellness, or educational content is a plus but not required



Timeline

I need this completed within 5 business days from when I hand you all materials. All content is written and photos will be provided — this is a design and layout job, not a writing job.



Budget

This is a one-time project with potential for ongoing work (I have additional digital products planned). Please include your rate for this project in your application.



How to Apply

Please send:

•2-3 examples of ebooks or PDF guides you’ve designed (links or attachments)

•Your rate for this project

•Your estimated turnaround time

•Which tools you use (Canva, InDesign, etc.)



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Airbnb VA Property Manager
description:
Senior Virtual Assistant – Airbnb Property Management Assistant to the Director



Position: Airbnb Property Management Assistant to the Director

Hours: Full-time – 40 hours per week (minimum 8 hours per day)

Location: Remote / Online

Industry: Short-Term Rentals / Airbnb Management

Payment: Paid weekly



We are seeking an experienced, highly organised and proactive Senior Virtual Assistant to support the Director in the day-to-day operations and optimisation of a growing portfolio of premium short-term rental properties.



This is a long-term full-time remote role suited to someone with proven experience in Hostaway and multi-channel listing management.



You will play a key role in ensuring listings are optimised, guests are supported, and operational tasks are handled efficiently across multiple platforms.



This role requires someone who is proactive, solutions-focused and able to provide insight and leadership to help improve systems and operations.



?



Key Responsibilities



Channel & Listing Management

• Airbnb

• Booking.com

• Stayz / VRBO

• Google Vacation Rentals



(All managed within Hostaway)



Responsibilities include:



• Monitoring listing performance, pricing updates and availability

• Managing PriceLabs integration and pricing adjustments

• Ensuring consistency of listing details, photos, amenities and house rules across all platforms

• Listing optimisation including titles, descriptions, photo ordering and SEO

• Identifying opportunities to improve occupancy, search ranking, reviews and overall guest experience



?



Guest Communication & Support



• Respond to guest enquiries and messages promptly and professionally

• Troubleshoot guest issues such as Wi-Fi connectivity or check-in access

?



Damage Claims & Review Management

• Collect supporting evidence and documentation

• Track and follow up claims through to resolution

• Maintain accurate records of incidents and outcomes



?



Welcome Packs & Guest Information



• Create and maintain digital guest welcome packs using Canva

• Maintain and update TouchStay guidebooks

• Ensure guest information is clear, current and property-specific

• Update house manuals, check-in instructions, local recommendations and FAQs



?



Social Media & Marketing Support



• Assist with social media content creation

• Create basic graphics using Canva

• Support listing promotion and marketing initiatives



?



Administrative & Director Support



• Provide general administrative support to the Director

• Assist with operational tasks and process improvements

• Support ad hoc projects related to property management and guest experience

• Identify opportunities to improve operational systems and efficiency



?



Leadership & Initiative



The successful applicant must:



• Be a leader within the role, not simply completing assigned tasks

• Offer insight and recommendations to improve operations and systems

• Be highly proactive and solutions-focused

• Demonstrate strong knowledge of short-term rental operations and Airbnb protocols

• Be a standout applicant with strong STR industry experience



?



Essential Requirements



Applicants must have demonstrated experience using:



• Hostaway PMS (essential)

• PriceLabs

• Airbnb

• Booking.com

• Stayz / VRBO

• Google Vacation Rentals

• TouchStay guidebooks

• Canva

Additional requirements:



• Strong understanding of Airbnb protocols, damage claims and cancellation policies

• Experience with listing optimisation and OTA search ranking

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Highly organised and detail oriented

• Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely

• Minimum 8 hours per day availability



?



Desirable 



• Experience supporting Australian Airbnb portfolios

• Familiarity with pricing strategies and occupancy optimisation

• Experience working with premium or family-focused short-term rentals



?



What We Offer



• Full-time, long-term remote role

• Flexible working hours (40 hours per week)

• Paid weekly

• Opportunity to work closely with the Director of a growing STR management company

• Stable workload across a diverse and expanding property portfolio

• Clear systems and opportunity to grow within the role

title: GoHighLevel & Make.com Automation Builder
description:
AI AUTOMATION SYSTEMS BUILDER — NO LMTS AI

Northwest Arkansas (Remote OK) | Contract | $DOE — We pay well for the right person



---



WHO WE ARE



NO LMTS AI is an AI automation agency building full backend systems for home service businesses — dumpster rentals, HVAC, roofing, plumbing, landscaping, and more. We don't sell templates. We build custom, end-to-end operational systems that replace the manual work running these businesses. Our current client is Outbound Dumpster Rental, where we've built an AI receptionist, automated job pipeline, driver dispatch system, nightly route optimizer, and invoicing automation — all integrated and running without human involvement.



We're growing fast and need someone who can build at this level alongside us.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE BUILDING



This is not a "set up a Zap" role. You will be building complex, multi-system automation architectures including:



- Full CRM builds in GoHighLevel (GHL) — pipelines, custom fields, tags, workflows with multi-branch logic, If/Else conditions, scheduled triggers, and internal notification systems

- AI voice agent builds in Retell AI — custom LLM prompts, function calling, webhook integrations, caller recognition, transfer logic, and GHL calendar booking

- Multi-step 
 scenarios — API calls to GHL, Samsara, Google Maps, Stripe, QuickBooks, and Google Sheets; webhook receivers; data transformation; scheduled batch processing

- Samsara GPS/telematics integration — geofence webhooks, driver tracking, API data pulls for efficiency reporting

- Stripe payment automation — invoice generation, recurring billing, payment link delivery via SMS

- Google Maps Directions API — route optimization across multiple stops with waypoint weighting and time window constraints

- QuickBooks integration — clean data push from GHL so transactions arrive pre-categorized

- Custom Google Sheets automation — auto-populated weekly reports built from multi-source data

- N8N and/or Zapier for specific integration bridges where needed



---



TECH STACK — YOU NEED TO KNOW THESE



Required (must be expert level, not familiar):

- GoHighLevel (GHL) — workflows, pipelines, custom fields, API, white-label setup

- 
 — complex multi-step scenarios, API modules, webhooks, error handling

- Retell AI — agent building, LLM prompting, function calling, webhook integration

- REST APIs — reading docs, building API calls, handling responses, authentication

- Stripe — payment links, recurring subscriptions, webhook events



Strong plus (you've built with these before):

- Samsara GPS platform and API

- Google Maps Directions API / Places API

- QuickBooks API or Zapier QuickBooks integration

- N8N

- Airtable or Google Sheets as a data layer

- Twilio or LC Phone for SMS routing

- OpenAI API or Claude API for agentic workflows



---



ON USING AI TOOLS



We use Claude heavily in our own build process and we encourage you to do the same. If Claude helps you move faster, understand an API, or work through a complex workflow — use it. We don't care how you get there. We care that you get there, that it works, and that it's built right. What we do require is that you actually understand what you're building. If something breaks, you need to be able to diagnose it — not just re-prompt your way out of it.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We need someone who:

- Has built real, complex automation systems — not tutorials, not demo accounts, actual client deployments

- Can read an API doc and build a working integration without hand-holding

- Thinks in workflows and data flows — you can map out a system on a whiteboard before you build it

- Communicates clearly when something is blocked, broken, or needs a different approach

- Can deliver a complete custom build in 2-3 days and handle 2-3 builds per week

- Is excited about what AI automation can do for small businesses — this matters to you, not just a paycheck



We do NOT need:

- Someone who needs to be told what to Google

- Someone who oversells their skill level — be honest about what you know and don't know

- Someone who disappears when a build gets hard



---



COMPENSATION



We pay well for good work, full stop. Rate is negotiable based on your skill level and what you can deliver. If you consistently hit 2-3 quality builds per week, you will be compensated accordingly — we have no interest in underpaying someone who performs. Name your number and we'll have a real conversation. We'd rather pay more for someone who executes than less for someone who can't.



This starts as contract/project-based with the potential to grow into a long-term role as we scale.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Don't send a generic resume. Send us:

1. Two or three systems you've built — describe what they do, what tools you used, and what was hard about them

2. Your honest skill level on each tool in our required stack (expert / proficient / familiar)

3. Your rate

4. How to reach you



Send to: 

Subject line: Systems Builder — [Your Name]

title: Webflow Developer + Animation Specialist (Spline / Rive / Three.js)
description:
We're completing our Webflow website and need a skilled developer who can both build pages and create high-quality   interactive animations that visualise how our AI agent and signal detection systems work.



Location & Availability

  - Must be based in the Philippines (non-negotiable)

  - Must be available to start immediately



The Role

This is a hands-on Webflow build and animation contract. The site structure exists but is incomplete — there are 16   missing pages, broken navigation, an empty footer, homepage bugs, and static images where there should be live   animations. Your job is to complete it.



This is not a template job. We need someone who can work natively inside an existing Webflow project, match our design  system, and build animations that are hardcoded and page-performance friendly — no video embeds on landing pages.

  ---

What You'll Be Building

1. Fix existing homepage issues

- Ticker bar has placeholder text — needs real content or removal

- Scroll-triggered pipeline section creates a ~3000px blank space at the top — sticky positioning needs to be fixed

- Footer is completely empty — needs a full build (links, logo, legal)

- All mega-menu nav links currently point to # — need to be wired to real pages

2. Build 16 missing pages (using 3–4 reusable templates)

3. Create AI Agent animations (hero & feature sections)

   Reference style: dark terminal UI / dashboard aesthetic with real-time data streams.

4. Full responsive QA

The current build may not be optimised for mobile/tablet. All pages and animations need to work across devices.

5. Custom branded 404 page

  

Must-Have Skills

- Webflow mastery — you work natively in the Webflow Designer, not just export code. CMS experience required (blog is  live; Playbooks and industry pages may need CMS structure)

- Animation experience — Spline 3D, Rive, or Three.js (at least one; ideally Spline or Rive for Webflow integration).



We need premium, interactive motion design — not CSS transitions

- B2B / SaaS marketing site experience — you understand how these sites are structured and what converts

- Ability to work within an existing project — not rebuild from scratch; match our design system and conventions



  Bonus Skills

  - GSAP

  - Webflow Interactions 2.0

  - Scroll-driven animation experience



What to Submit With Your Application

  1. A link to at least one Webflow site you've built in the last 12 months

  2. A link to at least one Spline, Rive, or Three.js animation you've built in the last 12 months

  3. A brief note on your availability and hourly rate



 your CV and examples to: 



Portfolios without animation examples will not be considered.



Trial Task

Shortlisted candidates will be offered a paid trial task (~8 hours) to build a service page template before any longer engagement is confirmed.



 your CV and examples to:

Salary: Up to PHP 25,000–35,000/month + commission (depending on qualifications and interview outcomes)

About the Role

Vertex Group is an Australian NDIS-focused business portfolio operating various brands across provider management software, compliance consulting, participant support, and plan management. We are looking for an SEO Specialist with strong content writing skills to grow our organic presence across traditional search engines and AI-driven platforms.

This role goes beyond standard SEO execution. You will own keyword strategy, produce high-quality content, manage technical SEO, and build our visibility in AI-generated search results — including platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. You will work across multiple brands within the NDIS sector, so understanding this space is a clear advantage.



? What You Will Do

SEO & Content Strategy

• Develop and execute SEO strategies that produce measurable organic growth across the Vertex Group brand portfolio.

• Create high-quality, NLP-friendly content aligned with target audience search intent and business goals.

• Build and maintain content frameworks, SOPs, and reusable execution templates.

• Optimise content for AI-generated search results through Answer Optimisation (AO) and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) techniques.

• Map content to funnel stages, from awareness through to conversion.

Keyword Research & Search Intent

• Own keyword research and identify high-impact opportunities across all brands.

• Map search intent across traditional and AI-driven search journeys.

• Align keyword targeting with audience segments, including NDIS providers, participants, and plan managers.

Technical SEO

• Identify and resolve technical issues including indexation, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, and site performance.

• Conduct regular SEO audits using industry-standard tools.

• Collaborate with developers and the marketing team to implement technical fixes efficiently.

• Manage and optimise WordPress websites using Elementor or equivalent page builders.

Paid Ads & Performance Marketing

• Plan, launch, and optimise paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.

• Manage and optimise campaigns on LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads,
 Ads, and YouTube Ads.

• Conduct A/B testing on creatives, copy, and targeting strategies to improve ROI.

• Monitor ad performance metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS) and provide actionable insights.

• Align paid campaigns with SEO and content strategies for full-funnel marketing impact.

? Social Media Post & Blog Content Creation (Added Section)

• Create engaging, brand-aligned social media content across
, LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok.

• Research and write high-quality blog articles optimised for SEO, user intent, and AI search visibility.

• Repurpose long-form content (blogs, SEO pages, whitepapers) into short-form social posts, reels, captions, and carousels.

• Develop consistent content calendars for each brand under the Vertex Group portfolio.

• Analyse social content performance and adjust strategies based on insights and trends.

• Ensure all social and blog content aligns with NDIS-specific audience behaviour and terminology.

Data, Reporting & Performance Tracking

• Track organic and paid performance using GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, and other tools.

• Deliver clear, actionable reports on SEO performance, ad campaigns, and content effectiveness.

• Monitor performance across both traditional search and emerging AI search channels.

Backlink & Authority Building

• Build quality backlinks through competitor analysis, outreach, and community engagement (Quora, Reddit, industry forums).

• Conduct domain authority and link quality analysis.

• Identify scalable, repeatable link acquisition opportunities.

Trends & Continuous Improvement

• Stay current with SEO, GEO, paid ads trends, and AI search developments including LLM-based search and platform shifts across Google, TikTok, and Instagram.

• Filter signal from noise — focus on high-impact changes, not every algorithm update.



? Requirements

• 2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience with a proven record of driving organic growth.

• Strong content writing skills — you can produce clear, well-structured, optimised content independently.

• Experience in social media content creation and blog writing.

• Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO.

• Hands-on experience managing paid ads (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads,
 Ads, and YouTube Ads).

• Experience with WordPress content management and optimisation.

• Hands-on experience with Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, GA4, and Google Search Console.

• Familiarity with GEO and AI-driven search platforms (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews).

• Strong analytical mindset — you translate data into clear next actions.

• Fluent in written and spoken English.

• Able to work independently and manage multiple projects in a remote setting.



? Preferred Qualifications

• Knowledge of the Australian NDIS (National Disability Insurance Scheme).

• Experience in a multi-brand environment.

• Active participation in Reddit, Quora, or niche community platforms.

• Familiarity with Answer Optimisation (AO) and structured content for AI citation.

• Experience with Elementor or similar WordPress page builders.

• Understanding of local SEO, particularly within Australian markets.



? A Note on NDIS Knowledge

The NDIS sector has its own language, compliance framework, and audience behaviour. Candidates who already understand terms like Support Coordination, Plan Management, NDIS registration, and the NDIS Quality and Safeguards Commission will move faster and create more relevant content from day one. This knowledge is not mandatory — but it is a strong differentiator.

title: Part-Time Content Operations Assistant — Legal Publishing Brand (UK, Remote, 10 hrs/week)
description:
Description:

We are a UK-based legal literacy publication focused on residential property law. We publish weekly articles, maintain a WordPress website, and are building an Instagram presence. We need a reliable, detail-oriented operations assistant to handle the publishing and administrative workflow so the founder can focus on writing and strategy.

This is a part-time, ongoing role — approximately 10 hours per week with potential to grow. We are looking for someone who takes pride in accuracy and follows instructions precisely. Legal content cannot have formatting errors.

What you will do:

Format and publish articles in WordPress from supplied drafts (headings, internal links, images, alt text, Yoast SEO fields, meta descriptions — all provided or guided by an SOP)

Schedule and post Instagram content using brand templates in Canva (captions and overlay text supplied by founder)

Manage
 marketing platform (Kit/ConvertKit) — monitor subscribers, check lead magnet delivery, tag subscribers by source

Maintain a weekly analytics report in Google Sheets (website traffic, subscriber count, Instagram metrics)

Perform basic SEO maintenance (image compression, internal linking between articles, monitoring Google Search Console)

What you will NOT do:

Write, edit, or rewrite any content — the editorial voice is the founder's

Engage publicly on social media or respond to comments as the brand

Handle any client communication or sensitive data

Requirements:

Proven WordPress publishing experience — you must have formatted and published blog posts, not just "know WordPress." Please include examples or screenshots in your application.

Canva experience — creating social media graphics from existing brand templates

Strong written English — you won't write content but you need to format it accurately without introducing errors

Experience with
 marketing platforms (Kit, Mailchimp, MailerLite, or similar)

Reliable internet connection

Available during UK/European morning hours (your afternoon/evening if in the Philippines) for daily async communication and a weekly check-in call

How we work:

Communication via Slack (async, daily)

Files shared via Google Drive

15-minute weekly video check-in (first month), then fortnightly

Full SOP document provided on hire — every task has a step-by-step guide with screenshots

All content is reviewed and approved by the founder before publishing (initially — approval loop relaxes over time as trust builds)

Hours and pay:

10 hours per week, fixed monthly retainer (not hourly billing). We will agree a monthly rate based on your experience. Budget is $175–$250/month. 13th-month bonus in December.

Payment via Wise, weekly for the first month, then biweekly.

To apply:

Please include: (1) a brief description of the last WordPress site you managed and your role, (2) a screenshot or link showing your WordPress formatting work, (3) your Canva experience, and (4) your availability in Philippine time that overlaps with 8am–12pm Central European Time.

Applications that do not include these four items will not be reviewed.

title: Talent Liaison Specialist
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

You will be the dedicated support person for O-1 visa talent candidates registered on O1DMatch. International professionals — researchers, engineers, athletes, artists, entrepreneurs — sign up on our platform and need a real human to guide them through the process. Your job is to onboard new candidates, help them complete their profiles, walk them through uploading their evidence documents, explain their AI-generated O-1 score, and coach them step by step from sign-up through receiving and signing an employer interest letter. You are their guide, their advocate, and their main point of contact inside the company. This role requires empathy, patience, excellent communication, and strong organizational skills.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAY-TO-DAY

•Welcome new talent candidates who sign up on O1DMatch and guide them through the onboarding process

•Help candidates understand how to complete their profile and what information to include

•Walk candidates through uploading evidence documents — awards, publications, memberships, press coverage — to the correct O-1 criteria categories

•Explain their AI-generated O-1 eligibility score and what it means for their visa case

•Keep candidates updated on the status of employer outreach being done on their behalf

•Help candidates review, accept, and sign interest letters received from employers

•Guide candidates on next steps after receiving a letter, including connecting with immigration attorneys through the platform

•Handle candidate questions via
, chat, and video call

•Maintain detailed notes on each candidate's progress in the CRM system



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE ARE LOOKING FOR

•Excellent written and spoken English with a warm, professional tone

•Strong empathy and patience — your clients are navigating a stressful, high-stakes immigration process

•Ability to explain complex processes like visa criteria and document requirements in plain, simple language

•Highly organized — you will manage many active candidates at different stages at the same time

•Experience in customer success, client support, account management, or similar roles

•Comfortable with video calls for onboarding and regular check-in sessions

•Familiarity with CRM or project tracking tools



NICE TO HAVE

•Experience working with international clients or professionals from different cultural backgrounds

•Background in immigration support, legal assistance, or HR

•Basic knowledge of US visa categories, especially O-1, EB-1, or H-1B



IMPORTANT NOTE

This role involves regular video and voice calls with international clients. Strong spoken English is essential.



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph, and send an
 to 
 include the following in your application message: (1) a brief description of any outreach, sales, research, or client-facing work you have done previously, (2) your English proficiency level and any relevant examples, and (3) your availability to work during US Eastern or Central time hours. Applications that do not include these details may not be reviewed.

title: Personal Brand Content Coordinator
description:
We are a husband-and-wife team building two personal brands: one in ecommerce entrepreneurship and one in real estate. 



We're looking for a sharp, organized, and creative Social Media Content Coordinator to help us plan, produce, and manage content across both brands. You will be the engine behind our content calendar, idea generation, and swiping of high performing content formats. You will have access to tools & you must be familiar with using AI.



Content Planning & Ideation (30% of time)



• Research trending topics, hooks, and content angles in both the ecommerce and real estate niches

• Use our existing content frameworks (100 Viral Hooks, 100 Content Ideas, 50 Content Prompts) to generate weekly content ideas for both brands

• Maintain and update two separate content calendars (using our Google Sheets template)

• Propose 15-20 content ideas per brand per month, organized by content pillar



Scripting & Pre-Production (25% of time)



• Draft short-form video scripts following our Hook - Problem - Promise - Credibility - Delivery - CTA framework

• Prepare shot lists and filming checklists for each batch filming session

• Identify which hooks, angles, and locations each video requires

• Organize and prep all materials so filming sessions take no more than 1-2 hours per month per brand



Post-Production Coordination (20% of time)



• Manage the editing workflow (either edit directly using CapCut/InShot or coordinate with a dedicated editor)

• Write captions that deliver standalone step-by-step value - not just teasers

• Add overlays, text hooks, and credibility proof where required

• Ensure all videos meet our production standards: vertical 9:16, multiple angles, proper lighting review



Publishing & Community Management (15% of time)



• Schedule and publish content across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and
 Reels

• Respond to comments and DMs using brand voice guidelines

• Manage comment-gated CTAs (e.g., when someone comments "grow," send them the appropriate link or invite)

• Monitor and flag engagement opportunities (collabs, viral trends, relevant conversations)



Analytics & Reporting (10% of time)



• Track weekly performance metrics: views, engagement rate, follower growth, saves, shares

• Deliver a simple weekly report highlighting top-performing content and insights

• Recommend adjustments to content strategy based on data



Requirements



• 2+ years of experience managing social media accounts (personal brands)

• Strong English writing skills - conversational, direct, first-person tone.

• Experience with short-form vertical video (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

• Proficiency with AI Tools (Manus, Claude), and Canva, CapCut or similar editing tools

• Highly organized with strong project management skills

• Familiarity with Google Sheets, Notion, or Trello for content calendar management

• Able to work independently across two brands without constant supervision



Bonus (Nice to Have)

• Experience in real estate or ecommerce content specifically

• Basic understanding of direct response copywriting principles (hooks, CTAs, fascinations)

• Video editing capability beyond basic cuts (transitions, text overlays, B-roll integration)

title: Senior SEO Specialist (Part-Time with Full-Time Potential)
description:
The Mission

We are a dynamic, creator-led business rapidly expanding our digital footprint. We are currently developing highly anticipated product concepts in stealth mode and need an exceptional SEO strategist to lay down the foundation for massive organic growth. We are building a robust brand ecosystem focused on deep audience engagement, and we need your expertise to ensure our new ventures dominate the search landscape from day one.



The Role

We are looking for a search visionary who can take complete ownership of our organic visibility. This role begins as a part-time position, offering you the flexibility to make a significant impact right away, with a strong, clear pathway to transition into a full-time role as our stealth products launch and the business scales.



What You Will Do



Architect and execute a comprehensive SEO strategy from the ground up to support our upcoming brand and product launches.



Conduct in-depth keyword research and competitor analysis to capture high-value traffic and drive genuine audience engagement.



Optimise all technical, on-page, and off-page elements across our digital properties.



Monitor traffic behaviour, analyse performance metrics, and pivot strategies to ensure maximum visibility.



Collaborate closely with our team to ensure all brand messaging is perfectly optimised for search without ever losing its authentic voice.



What You Bring to the Table



5 to 8 years of proven SEO experience: You have been in the trenches, you know what actually works, and you can confidently navigate the ever-changing search landscape.



Exceptional English communication skills: Flawless written and verbal communication is an absolute must. You need to be able to articulate complex SEO concepts into clear, actionable insights for the broader team.



Strategic business mindset: You understand that SEO is not just about rankings; it is a critical tool for long-term brand building and audience retention.



Self-starter energy: You thrive in a fast-paced, stealth-mode environment where you can build processes from scratch and take true ownership of your domain.



Why Join Us?

This is a rare opportunity to get in on the ground floor of a major brand evolution. You will have the creative freedom to shape our organic strategy from a blank slate and watch your work directly fuel the success of our new business ventures.



If you have the senior-level experience to dominate search rankings and the communication skills to lead the charge, we want to hear from you. Please send over your CV and a brief note on the most impressive SEO growth you have driven in your career.

title: React Native (Expo) Developer Needed – Peptide Tracking App (Supabase + Push Notifications)
description:

I’m building a mobile app for tracking peptide usage, including reconstruction calculations and reminder notifications. I already have a structured starter project (React Native + Expo + Supabase) and need an experienced developer to take it to a polished, production-ready level.



This is not a “build from scratch” job — the foundation is already done. I’m looking for someone who can improve, refine, and complete the app.



Current Stack:



React Native (Expo + TypeScript)



Supabase (Auth + Database)



Expo Notifications



Core Features Already Built:



User authentication (signup/login)



Peptide input + calculator (mg ? water required)



Save peptide protocols



Basic reminder scheduling



Local push notifications



What I Need Help With:



1. UI/UX Improvements



Clean, modern, premium feel (dark theme already started)



Better input flows and layout



Improve dashboard and peptide list screens



2. Reminder System (Important)



Multiple reminder times per day



Weekly / custom scheduling



Edit existing reminders



Cancel & reschedule notifications correctly



3. Code Quality + Structure



Clean up and optimise existing code
