title: Employer Outreach Specialist
description:
About the Company

O1DMatch (
) is a US-based AI immigration marketplace — think Indeed, but built around visas. We connect extraordinary international talent with US employers who can support their O-1 visa petition. The O-1 visa is a US work visa for people with extraordinary ability in fields like science, business, technology, arts, athletics, and education. Our platform uses AI tools to score talent profiles, generate USCIS-ready interest letters, and match candidates with employers across 40+ industries. We are a growing startup based in Charlotte, NC with a live platform, active users, and investor backing. These positions are fully remote and open to candidates in the Philippines.



ABOUT THIS ROLE

You will contact US employers on behalf of specific O-1 visa talent candidates registered on our platform. When an extraordinary person — an engineer, researcher, artist, or athlete — needs a US employer to write them an interest letter for their visa petition, you are the one who finds that employer and makes it happen. You will reach out to companies by
, LinkedIn, and phone, explain what O1DMatch is, introduce the specific candidate, and walk the employer through signing up and sending an interest letter. This is an outreach and relationship role. You need to be confident communicating with US businesses, comfortable with rejection, and consistent with follow-up.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAY-TO-DAY

•Review talent profiles on the O1DMatch platform and identify employers who would be a strong match for each candidate

•Reach out to US employers via
, LinkedIn, and phone on behalf of specific talent candidates

•Explain the O-1 visa process and what an employer interest letter is — and why it costs the employer nothing and creates no legal burden

•Guide interested employers to sign up on O1DMatch and send an interest letter to the candidate

•Follow up consistently with employers who have not yet responded

•Log all outreach activity and employer responses in our CRM database

•Coordinate with the Talent Liaison to keep candidates updated on outreach progress

•Report weekly on outreach numbers, response rates, and interest letters secured



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE ARE LOOKING FOR

•Excellent written and spoken English — you will be
ing and speaking directly with US businesses

•Experience with cold
 outreach, LinkedIn outreach, or B2B sales and recruitment tasks

•Comfortable making phone calls to US businesses during US business hours

•Ability to explain a complex process like O-1 visas and interest letters in simple, clear language

•Organized and able to track many employer conversations at the same time

•Familiarity with CRM tools or spreadsheet-based pipeline tracking

•Self-motivated and disciplined — you manage your own outreach pipeline without being reminded



NICE TO HAVE

•Prior experience in recruitment, business development, or immigration-adjacent work

•Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo.io, or similar prospecting tools

•Basic knowledge of US visa types, especially O-1, H-1B, or employment-based immigration



IMPORTANT NOTE

This role requires availability during US Eastern or Central time hours for employer calls and follow-up.



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. Please include the following in your application message: (1) a brief description of any outreach, sales, research, or client-facing work you have done previously, (2) your English proficiency level and any relevant examples, and (3) your availability to work during US Eastern or Central time hours. Applications that do not include these details may not be reviewed.

title: Talent Liaison Specialist
description:
About the Company

O1DMatch (
) is a US-based AI immigration marketplace — think Indeed, but built around visas. We connect extraordinary international talent with US employers who can support their O-1 visa petition. The O-1 visa is a US work visa for people with extraordinary ability in fields like science, business, technology, arts, athletics, and education. Our platform uses AI tools to score talent profiles, generate USCIS-ready interest letters, and match candidates with employers across 40+ industries. We are a growing startup based in Charlotte, NC with a live platform, active users, and investor backing. These positions are fully remote and open to candidates in the Philippines.



ABOUT THIS ROLE

You will be the dedicated support person for O-1 visa talent candidates registered on O1DMatch. International professionals — researchers, engineers, athletes, artists, entrepreneurs — sign up on our platform and need a real human to guide them through the process. Your job is to onboard new candidates, help them complete their profiles, walk them through uploading their evidence documents, explain their AI-generated O-1 score, and coach them step by step from sign-up through receiving and signing an employer interest letter. You are their guide, their advocate, and their main point of contact inside the company. This role requires empathy, patience, excellent communication, and strong organizational skills.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAY-TO-DAY

•Welcome new talent candidates who sign up on O1DMatch and guide them through the onboarding process

•Help candidates understand how to complete their profile and what information to include

•Walk candidates through uploading evidence documents — awards, publications, memberships, press coverage — to the correct O-1 criteria categories

•Explain their AI-generated O-1 eligibility score and what it means for their visa case

•Keep candidates updated on the status of employer outreach being done on their behalf

•Help candidates review, accept, and sign interest letters received from employers

•Guide candidates on next steps after receiving a letter, including connecting with immigration attorneys through the platform

•Handle candidate questions via
, chat, and video call

•Maintain detailed notes on each candidate's progress in the CRM system



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE ARE LOOKING FOR

•Excellent written and spoken English with a warm, professional tone

•Strong empathy and patience — your clients are navigating a stressful, high-stakes immigration process

•Ability to explain complex processes like visa criteria and document requirements in plain, simple language

•Highly organized — you will manage many active candidates at different stages at the same time

•Experience in customer success, client support, account management, or similar roles

•Comfortable with video calls for onboarding and regular check-in sessions

•Familiarity with CRM or project tracking tools



NICE TO HAVE

•Experience working with international clients or professionals from different cultural backgrounds

•Background in immigration support, legal assistance, or HR

•Basic knowledge of US visa categories, especially O-1, EB-1, or H-1B



IMPORTANT NOTE

This role involves regular video and voice calls with international clients. Strong spoken English is essential.



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. Please include the following in your application message: (1) a brief description of any outreach, sales, research, or client-facing work you have done previously, (2) your English proficiency level and any relevant examples, and (3) your availability to work during US Eastern or Central time hours. Applications that do not include these details may not be reviewed.

title: Land Comp Analyst / Land Appraiser (Vacant Land Specialist)

?

???? Please include the words “Apple” at the start of your response. Applications without this will not be considered.



?



Bonus Experience:

	•	Experience with Land Portal, Landsight, MLS, or similar platforms

	•	GIS or advanced mapping tools

	•	Zoning, subdivision, or land development knowledge

	•	Data analysis or underwriting experience



?



Compensation:

	•	Performance-based bonuses available

?



We’re looking for someone who takes pride in being accurate, fast, and dependable — and wants to grow with a team that’s actively acquiring land.

title: Account Manager- Inbound Sales & Client Services
description:
Proper Printshop · El Paso, TX (Remote) · Full-Time · $800–$1,000/mo + 1% commission · Philippines



Who we are:

Proper Printshop is a 15-year-old screen printing, DTF, embroidery, and fulfillment company based in El Paso, TX. We serve major universities, professional sports organizations, corporations, and businesses across the country- from 10,000 shirts for collegiate clients to 25 shirts for a birthday party. We move fast and take quality seriously, and we're looking for a front-office person who does the same.



The role:

You're the first voice and first response customers get from Proper Printshop. You'll own inbound quote requests, answer calls via Google Voice, build accurate quotes in Printavo, and follow up until orders are closed. When things are slow, you're not waiting around- you're making outbound calls to past customers and small businesses to generate new orders. You'll have full ownership of your accounts and earn commission on everything you bring in.



What you'll be doing:

Answering inbound calls via Google Voice during business hours (8-5 PM MST)- clear, confident, and friendly. Responding promptly to quote requests via
 and web form. Building accurate quotes in Printavo and following up to close. Entering and managing orders in Printavo- accuracy matters! Upselling add-ons like rush turnaround, premium garments, extra print locations, stickers, and promo items. Managing proofs, revisions, and keeping customers updated on timelines. Making outbound calls to past clients and small businesses to generate repeat and new orders. Tracking leads and follow-ups in HubSpot. Staying responsive on Google Chat and WhatsApp with the internal team throughout the day. Escalating large corporate or fulfillment program inquiries to the lead account manager.



What you need:

Fluent, natural spoken and written English- you're talking to US customers all day, this is non-negotiable. Clear, warm phone presence. Detail-oriented- bad quotes cost the shop money. Available and responsive 8 AM – 5 PM MST, Monday through Friday. Fast, reliable internet for live calls via Google Voice. Comfortable juggling multiple open orders and follow-ups at once. Self-starter- when there's no inbound, you're creating outbound.



Big plus:

Any Spanish. Background in print, apparel, or promo products. Experience with Printavo, HubSpot, or similar tools. Previous inside sales or account management experience.



Pay:

Base: $800–$1,000/month. Commission: 1% of all collected revenue. The more you sell and upsell, the more you make. Good closers earn well above base here.



Tools you'll use:

Google Voice, Gmail, Google Chat, WhatsApp, Printavo, HubSpot, Google Meet.



Before you apply:

If you're using AI to write your application, at least make it sound like you. We want to hear your voice- not ChatGPT's. Tell us about a time you turned a quote into a closed order, how you handled a difficult customer, or why you'd be great at this. Skip the template. Send us the real version of you.

title: AI Ad Creative Editor
description:
AI Ad Creative Editor — Remote (Full-Time)



MySweetSmile is an eight-figure DTC oral care brand trusted by over one million customers across the UK, US, and EU. We're hiring an AI Creative Editor to join our creative team and produce high-volume, high-quality ad creatives, product visuals, and video content across all channels.



This is a hands-on production role. You'll receive briefs from the Creative Team, and your job is to execute fast, use AI intelligently, and deliver polished, conversion-ready assets every single day.



You will be working directly within our proprietary AI Creative System alongside industry tools. If you're not already deep in the AI creative space, this role isn't for you.



---



What You'll Be Doing



Paid Social Ad Production

Edit and produce static and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, Google, and Amazon Ads. Execute UGC-style edits, product demos, overlays, animations, and performance-driven storytelling from supplied briefs. You will be expected to produce multiple finished ads per day.



AI-Driven Creative Production

Use our internal AI Creative System and external tools (Claude, Sora, Veo3, Nano Banana Pro, Kling, Midjourney, Runway) to generate, enhance, and iterate on creative assets at speed. You need to be an exceptional prompter who understands how to guide AI outputs to match a specific brief.



Graphic Design

Design static images, product renders, and visual assets for paid ads,
 marketing, Shopify image galleries, Amazon A+ Content, Amazon Brand Story, and Storefront. Clean, conversion-focused design with strong attention to visual hierarchy.



Video Editing (Short + Long Form)

Edit short-form paid social ads and longer-form content such as YouTube how-to guides, product walkthroughs, and educational videos.



Organisation & Workflow

Work within Notion (task management and briefs), Google Drive (asset storage and file management), and Slack (internal comms). You'll be expected to keep your work organised, name files correctly, update tickets, and manage your own pipeline without being chased.



---



Requirements



• Strong command of written English — you'll need to understand nuanced feedback, follow detailed briefs, and write clean on-screen text and captions.

• Proven experience producing high-performing ad creatives for eCommerce or DTC brands.

• Deep, practical experience with AI creative tools — not just awareness, but daily usage. You should be comfortable with Claude, Sora, Veo3, Nano Banana Pro, Kling, Midjourney, Runway, Photoshop AI, and similar.

• Strong proficiency in Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, and/or Final Cut.

• Experience producing Amazon A+ Content, image galleries, and eCommerce product visuals.

• Understanding of what makes a creative convert — you think about performance, not just aesthetics.

• Highly organised with experience using project management tools (Notion preferred).

• Ability to manage multiple deliverables with speed, accuracy, and minimal oversight.



---



Who This Is Not For



• People looking for a relaxed role. This is high output, every day.

• Creatives who prioritise aesthetics over performance.

• Anyone not already using AI tools daily in their creative workflow.

• People who need to be guided step-by-step instead of learning fast and taking ownership.

• Slow executors or anyone who can't handle direct feedback and fast turnarounds.



---



What You'll Gain



• Direct collaboration with the Managing Director and core creative team.

• Access to a proprietary, industry-leading AI Creative System built specifically for our brand.

• Clear briefs, clear expectations, and the opportunity to grow as our creative team scales.



---



How to Apply



Subject line: "MSS AI Creative Editor — Application"



Include all of the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1. A short written introduction covering your experience with AI-driven creative production, eCommerce ad creative, and why you're a fit for this role.



2. A portfolio showing:

   • Meta/TikTok ad creatives (static + video)

   • AI-enhanced or AI-generated work

   • Amazon A+ Content / image galleries / product visuals

   • UGC edits or paid social performance videos



3. Evidence of AI proficiency — show us real examples of work created using AI tools.



4. A brief summary of your editing, design, and AI toolset.



Applications missing any of the above will not be considered.

title: Full-Time Creative Short-Form Video Creator (Script, Shoot, Edit)
description:
Title: Full-Time Creative Short-Form Video Creator (Script, Shoot, Edit)



About Us

We’re Atmee AI, a real-time AI avatar platform that helps creators and brands deploy lifelike, conversational AI versions of themselves for customer engagement, support, and content.  We focus on live, interactive AI avatars (not static generated videos), and we’re looking for a creator who understands this new style of content and can make it fun, surprising, and scroll-stopping. 



Role Overview

We’re hiring a full-time video creator who can independently:

* Come up with creative, attention-grabbing ideas

* Script short TikTok / Reels / Shorts-style videos

* Shoot/record the content (with yourself, friends, props, or environments)

* Edit and publish-ready videos in vertical or horizontal format



You’ll be responsible for making 3–5 short videos per day, Monday–Friday, that feel as playful and creative as the top 
 Instagram accounts (fun hooks, unexpected locations, stunts/pranks, interactive text, etc.), but for our AI avatar product.



What You’ll Be Creating

You’ll create short-form videos that:

* Feel native to TikTok/IG/YouTube Shorts (lo-fi, fast-paced, fun, not corporate) 

* Show how creators, SaaS founders, or small businesses could use real-time AI avatars in surprising or funny ways

* Use hooks, text on screen, and visual gags to stop the scroll and make people want to share. 

* Highlight clear benefits like 24/7 presence, live conversations, and customer support, with simple, clear messaging. 



Your Day-to-Day

* Brainstorm 3–5 video ideas per day that can catch attention in the first 1–2 seconds. 

* Write quick scripts or bullet-point storyboards (hook, build-up, punchline/CTA). 

* Shoot footage yourself (on your phone/camera) or with available people/locations. 

* Edit videos in CapCut / Premiere or similar with captions, music, and on-screen text. 

* Deliver final videos to us daily (3–5 videos) and iterate quickly based on feedback. 



Hard Skills (Must Have)

Please only apply if you:

* Have a strong short-form video portfolio (TikTok / Reels / Shorts) where you did concept + script + filming + editing. 

* Are comfortable scripting and planning hooks, CTAs, and story flow, not just cutting clips. 

* Can film in vertical format with clear audio and stable framing. 

* Can edit fast and clean in tools like CapCut, Premiere, or similar. 

* Can produce 3–5 videos per day consistently when working full-time on this. 



Big plus if you:

* Have worked with SaaS or software tools before (explainers, testimonials, or UGC for apps). 

* Have any AI-related UGC (AI tools, AI avatars, AI content platforms, etc.). 

* Understand basic funnels (getting attention, driving clicks, simple CTAs). 



Soft Skills (How You Work)

* You’re proactive with ideas and not waiting for us to tell you every concept. 

* You communicate clearly in written and spoken English. 

* You’re reliable with deadlines and open to feedback and rapid iteration. 

* You’re comfortable working async with a small startup team. 



Trial Project & Pay

* Apply following the instructions below. If selected, we’ll start with a paid trial before hiring full-time. 



Trial project:

* Create 3 short vertical videos (15–45 seconds each) based on your own concepts after reviewing our website and product.

* Pay: $50 total for 3 videos



If the trial goes well, we’ll discuss a full-time monthly rate for ongoing work (expected 3–5 videos per day). 



How to Apply (Please Follow Exactly)

Include:

* Portfolio links (non-negotiable):

* 5–10 links to your best TikTok / Reels / Shorts where you did script + shoot + edit. 

* At least 2 examples where you used creative hooks, stunts, or playful ideas.



Short answers (1–3 sentences each): 

* What’s your experience creating short-form content where you own an idea ? script ? shoot ? edit?

* Have you created content for SaaS or AI tools before? If yes, which ones?

* Realistically, how many videos can you finish per day if this is your full-time focus?



Rate confirmation:

* Confirm you’re happy with the paid 3-video trial rate and share your expected monthly rate for full-time work (3–5 videos per day).

title: Sales Admin & AI Operations Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. AI Workflow Design & Maintenance

- Own the design, build, and ongoing maintenance of AI-assisted workflows across sales operations, client communications, and document management.

- Identify manual or repetitive processes and deploy automation solutions using tools such as n8n, Zapier, Make, or similar platforms integrated with LLMs.

- Maintain and iterate on prompt libraries, automated response flows, and AI-assisted drafting tools used by the sales team.

- Monitor AI workflow performance, troubleshoot failures, and implement improvements in response to operational feedback.



2. Sales Operations Support

- Manage CRM hygiene and data integrity, ensuring pipeline records, contact logs, and activity tracking remain current and accurate.

- Prepare regular sales reports and performance summaries for the Head of Sales, translating pipeline and activity data into clear, actionable insights.

- Support internal reporting requirements by compiling and structuring data from CRM and other operational systems.



3. Client Onboarding & Coordination

- Manage the preparation and tracking of client onboarding documentation, coordinating with compliance and operations to ensure timely completion.

- Act as a reliable point of contact for client queries, ensuring responses are substantive, accurate, and delivered within agreed timeframes.

- Organize and support client meetings, webinars, and product demonstrations, including logistics, materials, and follow-up coordination.



4. Process Improvement

- Proactively identify bottlenecks in sales and client service workflows and develop structured proposals for improvement.

- Document operational procedures and build internal knowledge bases that reduce dependency on tribal knowledge.



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE):

- 4+ years of experience in sales support, client operations, or administrative roles within financial services or a related regulated environment.

- Demonstrated hands-on experience building and maintaining AI-assisted workflows using tools such as n8n, Make, Zapier, or equivalent automation platforms.

- Working knowledge of LLM prompt design and practical application of AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) in a professional operations context.

- Proficiency in CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) with demonstrated experience maintaining data quality.

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; capable of producing client-grade documentation independently.

- Experience with client onboarding documentation or compliance-adjacent processes.

- Exceptional attention to detail — this role involves managing documentation, data, and client records where errors have direct business and reputational consequences. Candidates must demonstrate a track record of precision under workload pressure.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment, exercise sound judgment, and escalate appropriately.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (NICE-TO-HAVE):

- Experience building internal tools or documentation systems (e.g., Notion, Confluence, Airtable).

- Background working in or with cross-functional teams spanning compliance, product, and sales.

- Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Information Systems, or a related discipline.



SUCCESS METRICS (FIRST 6–12 MONTHS):

- At least 3 recurring manual workflows have been replaced or materially accelerated through AI automation, with measurable time savings documented.

- Sales reports are delivered consistently on schedule, with the Head of Sales confirming they are actionable and replacing previously manual consolidation efforts.

- Client onboarding turnaround time meets or improves on established benchmarks, with zero compliance escalations attributed to documentation errors.

- CRM data integrity score (completeness and accuracy) meets the internal standard set by the sales lead.

- Sales team reports a meaningful reduction in administrative overhead, allowing more time to be allocated to client-facing activities.



ABOUT FINTONIA GROUP:

Fintonia Group is a technology-enabled digital assets financial services platform with offices in Singapore and Kuala Lumpur. The firm combines deep institutional finance expertise with a focused mandate to bring credible, regulated financial services infrastructure to the digital assets space.



The team is composed of professionals with backgrounds at leading global investment banks and financial institutions. Fintonia operates in a dynamic, high-accountability environment where individual contributions have direct business impact and where the expectation is ownership, not execution of instructions.



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link - 
 . 

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & Integration Specialist (Funnels + Mentomind Setup)
description:
I am looking for a GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist with strong experience in automation, integrations, funnel building, and CRM setup.



This is a project-based / part-time (hourly) role. We’re still in the early stage, so tasks will be assigned as needed, not all at once.



Main Task (Initial Project)



Your first priority will be:

Integrate Mentomind (course platform) with GoHighLevel

Set up a system where:

Users purchase via GHL checkout

Payments are handled inside GHL (not Mentomind)



After purchase:

User account is automatically created in Mentomind

Access to the correct course is granted



Goal: We want to fully control payments and automation inside GHL, while using Mentomind only for course delivery.



Other Skills We Need 

- Updating/building funnels inside GHL

- Creating forms and surveys (with conditional logic)

- Setting up automations and workflows

- Creating and managing pipelines

- Organizing and structuring the CRM (contacts, tags, stages, etc.)



Responsibilities

- Set up and manage GHL automations

- Handle integrations (API, webhooks, etc.)

- Build funnels, forms, and workflows when needed

- Create and optimize pipelines + CRM structure

- Ensure smooth end-to-end user experience

- Troubleshoot and improve systems



Requirements

- Strong experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Experience with integrations (API, webhooks, Zapier, etc.)

- Experience building funnels, automations, and CRM systems

- Ability to think in systems and user flows (not just basic setup)

- Reliable and responsive



Work Setup

- Project-based / task-based

- Paid hourly

- Flexible schedule

- Ideal for part-time freelancers



Perfect if you’re looking for ongoing side projects, not a full-time role.



How to Apply



Please include:

1.  “I AM A GHL EXPERT” as your subject line.

2.  Start your
 with your favorite animal (this helps us filter attention to detail).

3. Examples of GHL funnels, automations, CRM setups, or integrations

4. Any experience with course platforms or memberships

5. A short explanation of how you would approach the Mentomind + GHL setup

6. Send your application to: hello[at]learnforlifetestprep[dot]com





Important



We move fast  so we need someone who:

-Communicates clearly

title: Campaign Coordinator (Remote | Part-Time | Digital Advertising)
description:
Be Better Advertising is a performance-driven digital advertising company focused on scaling campaigns across multiple traffic sources and geographies. We move fast, use AI tools to accelerate work, and hold a high bar for attention to detail.

We're building a lean, high-performing team, and we’re looking for people who take ownership, think critically, and are excited to grow with us.





The Role

We're looking for a Campaign Coordinator who will own the process of adapting and launching campaigns across traffic sources (e.g., MGID, RevContent, Taboola) and markets.





What You'll Do

• Launch and prepare new advertising campaigns across multiple platforms (Taboola, MGID, RevContent, etc.)

• Adapt existing campaigns to new geographies and traffic sources

• Translate and localize landing pages using AI tools (ChatGPT/LLMs)

• Ensure campaigns comply with platform-specific guidelines

• Organize and upload campaign assets (landing pages, creatives, tracking links)

• Maintain structured documentation in Google Drive and project management tools (Trello)

• Follow standardized processes for launching, testing, and scaling campaigns

• Communicate task completion clearly and keep workflows organized





You're a Great Fit If You...

• Have experience with digital advertising platforms (MGID, RevContent, Taboola, or similar)

• Are comfortable using AI tools and can spot when they get things wrong

• Are highly detail-oriented — you catch things others miss

• Take ownership of your work and don’t rely on constant supervision

• Can follow SOPs independently and execute with consistency

• Are organized, reliable, and communicate proactively



Requirements

• Minimum 1 year of experience in digital marketing, campaign coordination, or related field

• Strong written English

• Proficient with advertising platforms, Google Workspace, and project management tools (Trello or similar)





[Project availability — Average of 20h/week — Philippine time zone]





How to Apply

To apply, please submit:

• Your resume / CV

• A short Loom video (2–4 minutes) introducing yourself, your background, and why you're a great fit for this role.

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.





We review applications on a rolling basis and move quickly.

If this role sounds like a fit, we’d love to hear from you — apply now and show us how you think.

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus

title: Full time Digital Marketig Specialist
description:
TITLE:

Digital Marketing Coordinator (aka; Advertising, Media & Communications Manager)



BUSINESS:

Our business is a dream to work for…

• We provide content promotion and lead generation to global personalities and professionals.

• Our focus (and soon to be your focus) is to help global personalities and professionals succeed by driving attention to their most powerful educational content and drive leads to their business to increase their sales. To do this, we recruit the best video editors, graphic designers, content writers, paid ad media buyers and more.



ROLE:

This role is perfect for you, if…

• You are looking to work in a role of an experienced Digital Marketing Coordinator

• You want to work on multiple clients marketing campaigns, working with media buyers/graphic designers/video editors/content writers

• You have confidence and enjoy speaking professionally with clients (written and verbal)

• You want to work remotely, full time (40 hours) a week - Monday to Friday

• You’re interested in Day Shift hours, during Melbourne, Australia business hours

• You have a University Level Education

• And, you already have advanced skills in building (or running) paid digital advertising campaigns



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Your responsibilities will include…

 copy, etc

We will provide training on how to execute each item above, as long as you are the type of person who has the will to learn and master it.



REQUIREMENTS:

• Most importantly, you desire to learn and obtain new responsibilities



SOFTWARE & TOOLS:

 (gmail)

title: Amazon Client Acquisition Specialist (PL & PPC Lead Gen)
description:
We are a growing Amazon agency looking for a proactive and results-driven Amazon Client Acquisition Specialist from the Philippines to join our team. Your primary role will be to identify, contact, and secure new clients—specifically Amazon Private Label sellers and brands who need expert management for their Amazon PPC and overall account growth.



This is a unique role that blends lead generation, sales, and a strong understanding of the Amazon ecosystem. You will be the first point of contact for potential clients, helping us expand our portfolio and provide valuable services to sellers looking to scale.



Responsibilities:

Lead Generation & Prospecting: Identify potential clients (Amazon Private Label sellers) through platforms like LinkedIn, online communities, Amazon seller forums, and by analyzing Amazon listings. Build and maintain a strong pipeline of qualified leads.

Outbound Sales & Outreach: Initiate contact with decision-makers via personalized
, LinkedIn, and other channels. Articulate the value of our Amazon PPC management and account growth services.

Client Communication & Qualification: Engage with prospects to understand their current challenges, goals, and service needs. Qualify leads to ensure they are a good fit for our services.

Relationship Building: Nurture relationships with potential clients, positioning our company as a trusted partner for their Amazon growth.

Market Research: Stay updated on Amazon selling trends, PPC strategies, and the competitive landscape to better understand client pain points and tailor outreach.

Collaboration: Work closely with our PPC and account management teams to ensure a smooth handoff of new clients and provide feedback from the market.

Reporting: Track outreach activities, lead status, and conversion metrics to provide regular updates on client acquisition progress.



Required Skills & Qualifications:



Proven experience in sales, business development, or lead generation, specifically for Amazon services (e.g., PPC management, account management, listing optimization).

Strong understanding of Amazon Private Label (PL) and FBA business models. You should know what a PL seller's world looks like and speak their language.

Familiarity with Amazon PPC (campaign types, key metrics like ACOS/ROAS) is a major advantage, as it will enable you to confidently discuss our services with potential clients.



Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with a neutral accent.

Proficiency with sales and research tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator,
 automation tools, and CRM software.

Self-motivated, organized, and results-oriented. You are comfortable working independently and managing your own pipeline.

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated workspace for remote work.



Nice-to-Have Skills:



Existing network or experience within Amazon seller communities.

title: Media Buyer Assistant (Fashion Dropshipping)
description:
Job Description:



We are a fast-growing fashion e-commerce business looking for a Media Buyer Assistant to start with simple tasks and grow into full media buying responsibilities over time.



For now, your main job will be to upload campaigns that our product lister has already prepared (creatives) and do two quick check-ups during the night to turn off underperforming ads if needed.



This currently takes around 10–15 minutes total per day (split into two logins). In the future, as you gain experience and prove reliability, your role will expand to:



Scaling and downscaling campaigns



Turning off underperforming campaigns based on our set criteria



Full campaign management



We are looking for someone detail-oriented, reliable, and with experience in fashion dropshipping advertising.



???? Responsibilities:



Phase 1 – Current (Entry Tasks)



Upload new ad campaigns daily (prepared by product lister).



Double-check targeting, placements, and creatives are correct.



Do 2 quick check-ins (1–2 AM and 4–5 AM PH time) to turn off ads if they’ve reached our criteria.



Phase 2 – Future (Growth Responsibilities)



Scale and downscale campaigns following company strategy.



Turn off underperforming ads using defined performance rules.



Assist in analyzing campaign performance.



Report daily key metrics.



???? Requirements:



Must have experience with fashion dropshipping ads (Meta Ads Manager).



Very detail-oriented (errors in uploads waste ad spend).



Comfortable doing 2 short logins during 1–2 AM and 4–5 AM PH time.



Strong communication in English.



Reliable and consistent.



???? Work Schedule:



2 short logins per night: once between 1–2 AM PH time, and once between 4–5 AM PH time.



Current workload: ~10–15 minutes total per day.



Future workload: more hours as responsibilities expand.



???? Salary:



$15 USD per week (fixed) during upload/check-in phase.



Salary will increase as more responsibility is granted (scaling, optimization, reporting).



Paid weekly on Wednesday via Wise.



???? How to Apply:



Please send:



A short intro about your experience with fashion dropshipping ads.



Examples of ad accounts or campaigns you have managed (screenshots are fine).



Confirmation you can log in at 1–2 AM and 4–5 AM PH time daily.

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder — Copy, Rebrand & Translate Competitor Advertorials (Daily Work)
description:
BUDGET: $15 USD per funnel | 7 days a week (Past experience with proof is needed)



---



ABOUT THE ROLE

--------------

I run a dropshipping business selling health and skincare products in Portugal. I need a funnel builder who can take

competitor advertorials and product pages, rebrand them to my brand and

colors, translate them into the target language, and publish them — fast.



This is a 7-days-a-week ongoing role. If you are reliable and fast,

you will have consistent daily work with me long-term.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO EACH TIME

---------------------
. I send you a competitor advertorial/product page URL

2. You study the layout, structure and copy style

3. You use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to:

   - Translate it into the target language (Portuguese)

   - Rebrand all product names, brand names and claims to my brand

   - Rebrand all product images to match our branding

4. You rebuild the page in Funnelish

  5. You apply my brand colors, fonts and logo throughout

6. You deliver a live preview link within 48 hours



Each funnel = 1 advertorial page + 1 product/order page.



---



WHAT I PROVIDE

---------------

- Competitor reference URLs for each funnel

- My brand name, logo, colors and product images

- Product details and any specific claims to include or avoid

- Fast feedback — I will review and approve within 24 hours



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR

---------------------

? MUST HAVE Past Experience building advertorial-style pages (the "article that sells" format)

? Comfortable using AI tools to rewrite and translate copy

? MUST HAVE Experience with Funnelish

? Can match the look and feel of a reference page closely

? Reliable — available 7 days a week, responds within a few hours

? Fast — 48-hour turnaround per funnel is the expectation

? Good eye for design — pages must look professional and trustworthy



---



TO APPLY — ANSWER THESE 5 QUESTIONS

--------------------------------------

Applications without answers to all 5 questions will be ignored.



1. How long have you been using Funnelish?

2. Have you built advertorial/pre-lander pages before?

   Share 2 live examples or screenshots.

3. Have you used AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for copywriting or

   translation?

4. Can you work 7 days a week and deliver within 48 hours per funnel?

5. Leave your number in this format +?6?3?1?2?3?4?5?6?7?8

---



RATE: $15 USD per complete funnel (advertorial + product page)

TYPE: Full-time ongoing, 7 days a week

HOURS: Flexible — async communication is fine, but fast responses expected

START: Immediately

title: Client Services Liaison

clients.

who may be navigating important legal planning decisions. This role requires a client-first

in a law firm or familiarity with trust and estates is highly preferred.



Key Responsibilities

- Serve as the first point of contact for prospective and current clients.

- Respond to and manage incoming leads through phone,
, and other communication channels.

- Guide prospects through the firm’s intake process and introduce them to our services.

- Build rapport with potential clients and help convert qualified leads into retained clients.

- Schedule consultations and coordinate appointments with attorneys and team members.

- Maintain organized client records and communications throughout the intake process.

- Conduct timely follow-ups with leads and clients to ensure a positive experience.

- Professional, friendly, and client-focused demeanor.

- Experience working in a law firm or familiarity with trust and estates practice is highly preferred.

- Proficiency with CRM, scheduling, and communication tools such as Calendly, Dialpad, Lawmatics, or similar systems.

What We Value

- Reliability and attention to detail

- Commitment to providing exceptional client service.

 us at:

title: Video Editor, Social Media Manager, Virtual Assistant
description:
Paid weekly or Bi-weekly with the expectation of accomplishing the week’s total workload/quota



Starting at 8 hours per day. 3.5 days per week.



I am creating a small content creation team of 2 video editors/social media managers/virtual assistants. 



1 person will be hired first & the second will be hired 1-2 months later after best practices are established. Eventually, the team can work together decide their own scheduling for each week.



I have 2 content based brands which need a lot of video editing & short form clipping for marketing.



Brand #1: 
 

- the current kind of content on that page isn’t a good representation of what you will be asked to edit, but that’s the brand you will be editing for.

- you will be asked to cut daily 3hour-7hour livestreams into short 10-20minute vlogs. These vlog edits will be fairly simple. Only including moments featuring high intensity action, emotion, connection or discussion. 

- from these “highlights”, you will be asked to create engaging clips of each moment and post these clips on across all social media platforms

- there is also a miscellaneous quota for posting other kinds of related content to foster the most engagement. example: trial reels of previous popular content



Brand #2: 
 

- I am a head coach of this dating company teaching men social & seduction skills.

- I will be recording my coaching sessions to be similarly cut into engaging shortform captions.

- I will also shoot shortform & longform lesson based videos which will need to be cut, edited & posted onto all social media platforms



Primary Skill Required: Vlog-style video editing & high volume posting across all social media platforms (up to 50+ posts per day)

- editing & project sharing on adobe premiere pro. (I can pay for your monthly subscription)

- the most important skill is understanding emotionally impactful & engaging content. I will have 10 years of experience as a content producer. If I can create edits better than what the candidates can produce, they will be released or not considered for employment.



Secondary Skill: Miscellaneous work as a social media manager/virtual assistant to help with each brand’s needs as they arise.





This is what the hiring process will look like:

1. I will review applications. 

2. I will select desired candidates and send them an example vlog of what I’m seeking to create.

3. Selected candidates then should edit an example vlog from a new 3hour-7hour livestream. As well as three 8 second to 30 second shortform trailer edits; ideally deeply moving/engaging. An example will be provided. (You will be paid $20 for this trial)

4. From the work reviewed, I will select whomever seems like the best fit and work is scheduled to begin by April 15th.



Candidate must:

- be fluent in English

- provide examples of their body of  work related to what this job requires 



Please briefly  in your application tell me: 

- whether the $5/hour offered rate is low, normal or high for what you are seeking. 

- what your main passion/hobby in life is

- where do you see yourself professionally in 5 years



If/as the content monetizes well, hourly rates can raise to double or triple over time. 



Warning: My content, topics & sense of humor can often be often extremely crude, offensive & politically incorrect. Whoever applies must be able to either understand or enjoy those instances.

title: Videographer & Social Media Content Manager
description:
ABOUT ANATA INC.

Anata Inc. is a growing e-commerce and retail brand with an active presence across major social media platforms. We create content that connects with our audience, showcases our products, and drives real engagement. We are looking for a creative, detail-oriented professional to join our remote team.



ROLE OVERVIEW

As our Videographer & Social Media Content Manager, you will edit raw video footage, create polished short-form and long-form content using our brand templates, and publish daily posts across all platforms.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Edit, trim, and clip raw video footage into platform-ready content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, long-form videos)

- Apply brand-approved templates, overlays, captions, and graphics for visual consistency

- Schedule and publish daily posts across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, LinkedIn, and more

- Follow and execute a content calendar, meeting all daily and weekly publishing deadlines

- Tailor content dimensions, captions, and hashtags for each platform

- Maintain an organized library of raw footage and edited files

- Stay current with social media trends, viral audio, and algorithm updates

- Provide basic weekly performance summaries (views, engagement, reach)

- Collaborate with the team to receive footage, creative direction, and feedback



PLATFORMS

Instagram (Feed, Reels, Stories), TikTok, YouTube (Long-form & Shorts),
, LinkedIn, and more as needed.



REQUIRED SKILLS

- Proven video editing experience for social media (portfolio required)

- Proficiency in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar tools

- Strong understanding of social media platforms and best practices

- Experience using pre-made templates (Canva, Adobe Express, or similar)

- Ability to meet daily publishing deadlines independently

- Basic knowledge of caption writing, hashtag strategy, and social media SEO

- Excellent attention to detail and strong visual aesthetics

- Reliable internet and a computer capable of video editing

- Comfortable communicating in English



NICE TO HAVE

- E-commerce or retail content creation experience

- Familiarity with scheduling tools (Buffer, Later, Metricool, etc.)

- Basic motion graphics or animation skills

- YouTube SEO and thumbnail design experience



WORK SETUP

- Part-Time, Remote (~20 hrs/week)

- Flexible schedule; daily availability required for on-time posting

- 2-week paid trial period

- Brand templates, content calendar, and asset library provided



HOW TO APPLY

Please submit: (1) your resume, (2) links to at least 3 social media pages or videos you have managed/edited, and (3) a brief note on why you are the right fit. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Social Media Virtual Assistant — TikTok Scheduling & Community Management
description:
About the Role

We are a growing US-based publishing brand creating content across health, wellness, and faith niches. We run active TikTok channels and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA to take ownership of scheduling, posting, and community interaction so our founder can focus on content creation and strategy.

This is a part-time remote role starting at approximately 5 hours per week, with confirmed growth to 10+ hours as a second faith-based channel launches in the coming months.



What You'll Be Doing

Uploading and scheduling pre-made TikTok videos according to a provided posting schedule (three times daily). Adding captions, hashtags, and descriptions from pre-written templates. Responding to comments using a pre-approved response bank within the first hour of posting. Flagging comments that require a personal response from the founder. Basic weekly analytics reporting — views, followers, and engagement — using a simple template we provide. Taking on a second TikTok channel focused on Christian women's content as the brand grows.



What We're Looking For

Proven experience managing TikTok accounts — please include examples or results in your application. Reliable internet connection and availability to monitor and respond during US time zones. Strong written English — you will be representing the brand voice in comments. High attention to detail — captions, hashtags, and posting times must be exact. Proactive communicator who flags problems quickly rather than guessing. Comfortable working across both wellness and faith-based content. Experience with scheduling tools, Canva, or similar platforms is a bonus but not essential as full training will be provided.



Hours

Starting at 5 hours per week, growing to 10+ hours as the second channel launches. Flexible remote working.



To Apply

Please tell us: which TikTok accounts have you managed and what results did you achieve? What US time zones are you available to work in? What is your hourly rate?

title: Assistant Controller
description:
**PLEASE CAREFULLY READ ALL THE DETAILS BEFORE APPLYING***



JOB TITLE: Assistant Controller

Work Type: Remote/WFH, Full-time

Rate: TBD

Duration: This is for a long-term hire (3–5+ years minimum) to ensure stability and avoid turnover.

Working Hours : Central Time

Start Date: Target start date is early MAY



NOTE:



--> This role will begin as an Assistant Controller, with the opportunity for promotion to Controller if everything goes well.

--> This is an assistant role, not the main Controller position. The focus is more on providing support rather than leading or owning the full Controller function.

--> Client Interview Stage:

           There will be a live Excel skills test.

           There will be a business overview ? candidate reiterates to confirm comprehension.



JOB OVERVIEW:



The Controller will manage all fund, corporate, and property-level accounting and reporting across the client's real estate investment platform. This role oversees cash management, capital activity, investor operations, financial reporting, audit/tax support, and coordination with fund administrators and property managers. The ideal candidate is organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced, multi-entity private equity environment.



JOB ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES:



Treasury & Cash Management



Maintain LOC, draw, and cash activity trackers; process transfers, wires, and invoice payments.

Complete bank reconciliations, classify cash activity, and monitor liquidity.

Manage distributions, NACHA uploads in KeyBank, and quarterly cash-flow analysis.



Fund & Investor Accounting



Maintain investor records in Juniper Square; process sub docs, capital calls, rebalancing, and distributions.

Enter capital, GAV/NAV, and asset data into Juniper Square; create new entities as needed.

Prepare capital call amounts, distribution analysis, and quarterly reporting support.



Financial Reporting



Review monthly property financials and capital activity.

Prepare HEP Manager and selected SPV financials; compare actuals to forecasts.

Support quarterly fund reporting, PCAP reviews, and coordination with fund administrators.



Audit & Tax Support



Provide PBCs, schedules, valuation support, and respond to auditor requests.

Assist with annual tax workpapers, K-1 review/distribution, 1099 processing, and municipal/state filings.



Entity Administration



Maintain annual state filings, insurance renewals, and corporate compliance.

Manage intercompany billing, legal invoice approvals, and post-closing S&U/proration tracking.



Systems & Process Management



Work extensively in Juniper Square, QuickBooks, KeyBank, and Yardi.

Implement best practices with fund admins and improve internal workflows.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:



Qualifications:



Bachelor’s in Accounting or Finance; CPA preferred.

Ideally with 5–10+ years in real estate private equity, fund accounting, or property accounting. (can consider 3–4 years of experience, as long as you have the right experience)

Strong Excel and systems skills.

Excellent communication, organization, and deadline management.

Must have Private Equity Real Estate (PERE) experience.

Familiarity with complex fund structures.

Capable of and willing to commit to a long-term engagement (minimum of 3–5+ years) to ensure stability and minimize turnover.



Why Work with Gabtech Global, LLC?



At Gabtech Global, we are committed to supporting our consultants and creating an environment where people can grow and succeed.



We uphold our core values:



EXTRA MILE: We do more than what’s expected of us.

RELIABLE: We do what we say we’ll do. No follow-ups are needed.

TEAM PLAYER: We collaborate with each other to achieve our goals.

GENUINE CARE: We do what we do because we want to, not because we have to.

HUNGRY TO LEARN: We strive to be better every day.

title: Amazon Account Specialist
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a sharp, autonomous Amazon Account Specialist to take full ownership of our Seller Central operations. This isn't a role for someone who just follows a script; we need a problem-solver who understands the "why" behind Amazon’s rules and knows how to navigate them effectively. You will be the sole point of contact for customer inquiries, account health, and tactical compliance.



Key Responsibilities

Account Health & "Tactical" Compliance: Monitor account health dashboard daily. Handle restricted product flags, documentation requests, and compliance hurdles. You should be comfortable finding creative, effective ways to resolve "non-traditional" compliance issues and navigating Amazon’s automated systems to keep listings active.



Customer Experience: Manage the daily inbox (typically 1–2 messages per day). Provide high-quality, professional responses that protect our seller rating and resolve buyer issues instantly.



Seller Central Troubleshooting: Act as the primary liaison with Seller Support. Fight for case resolutions, fix stranded inventory, and update listing data as needed.



Operational Support: General administrative tasks related to the Amazon storefront to ensure "everything is just handled."



The Ideal Candidate

The "Amazon Veteran": You’ve been inside Seller Central long enough to know that "The Rules" and "How things actually work" are often two different things.



Smart & Adaptive: Since volume is low, we don't need a robot. We need someone who can spend their time researching new workarounds or optimizing a process when things are quiet.



High Level of Discretion: You understand the nuances of compliance in the Amazon world and can execute strategies to keep the account safe without overcomplicating simple tasks.



English Fluency: Excellent written English is a must for both customer service and drafting persuasive appeals to Amazon.



Technical Requirements

Proven experience with Amazon Seller Central (specifically Account Health and Case Logs).



Experience handling "difficult" compliance or reinstatement issues is a major plus.



Ability to work independently with minimal daily supervision.

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (Google + ChatGPT + AI Platforms)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing digital growth company operating two core brands:



Referwo – an influencer marketing platform helping brands scale through creators and track ROI

Elinix AI – a growth partner for ecommerce brands, focused on website optimisation,
 revenue systems, and AI-driven marketing



We also manage SEO and growth strategies for a portfolio of ecommerce and service-based clients globally.



Role Overview



We are looking for a results-driven SEO & AI Search Specialist to join us on a part-time basis, with a clear pathway to transition into a full-time role based on performance.



You will take ownership of organic growth across:



Google search

AI search platforms such as ChatGPT and emerging AI discovery engines

Content-driven SEO across websites and landing pages



This role goes beyond traditional SEO. You will play a key role in positioning our brands and clients for the future of search.



Key Responsibilities



1. Google SEO Strategy & Execution

Develop and execute SEO strategies for Referwo, Elinix AI, and client websites

Perform keyword research, competitor analysis, and search intent mapping

Optimise on-page SEO including metadata, internal linking, content structure, and technical SEO

Drive organic traffic, rankings, and conversions



2. AI SEO (ChatGPT & AI Search Optimisation)

Optimise content to be discoverable in AI tools like ChatGPT and other AI search platforms

Structure content for AI retrieval, summarisation, and citation

Implement strategies for entity recognition, topical authority, and semantic SEO

Monitor and improve how brands appear in AI-generated responses



3. Content Strategy & Execution

Plan and manage SEO content calendars (blogs, landing pages, guides)

Create or collaborate on content aligned with both ranking and conversion

Ensure content supports both Google SEO and AI discoverability



4. Technical & Performance SEO

Conduct site audits and resolve technical SEO issues (site speed, indexing, schema, etc.)

Implement structured data and best practices for modern search

Track and analyse performance using tools like Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, SEMrush



5. Client SEO Management

Manage SEO strategies across multiple client accounts

Provide clear reporting on rankings, traffic, and ROI

Continuously identify growth opportunities and optimisation strategies



Requirements



Proven experience in SEO (agency or in-house)

Strong understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

Experience with SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, etc.)

Understanding of AI search trends and how LLMs retrieve and rank content

Ability to think strategically and execute hands-on



Bonus Points



Experience optimising for AI tools such as ChatGPT or Perplexity

Knowledge of semantic SEO and entity-based optimisation

Experience in ecommerce SEO (Shopify preferred)

Understanding of conversion optimisation and content funnels



Role Structure



Part-time role (flexible hours)

Opportunity to transition into a full-time position based on performance and results

Exposure to multiple brands and industries

Direct impact on growth and strategy



What We’re Looking For



Someone who understands that search is evolving beyond Google

A proactive problem-solver who can test, learn, and iterate quickly

A results-focused individual who cares about impact, not just rankings



What You’ll Be Working On



Scaling Referwo’s organic acquisition and brand visibility

Growing Elinix AI’s inbound leads through SEO and AI search

Improving SEO performance across a portfolio of client brands



How to Apply



Please include:



Your portfolio or case studies

Examples of SEO results you’ve achieved

Any experience with AI search optimisation

Your expected hourly rate or monthly retainer

title: YouTube Expert Strategist Needed
description:
About us

We run a YouTube entertainment business across multiple channels. We have previously built a YouTube channel to over 300,000 subscribers, and we are now building new channels from scratch. 

We create highly engaging entertainment content and are looking for someone with strong, well-rounded YouTube experience who can support our CEO with the many different kinds of work that touch YouTube.



How you’ll work with us

The CEO leads the business. This role is not to run every part of the company alone, and not to personally own every single step of every video unless that’s what we agree together. 



We need someone who can assist the CEO with research, ideation, and judgment, bounce ideas, pressure-test concepts, and help us think through how to create content that is worthy of breaking out—including what strong performance and “viral potential” actually mean for our niches and channels.



You should understand YouTube from start to finish: how discovery and packaging work, what makes ideas strong or weak, and how to think about consistent, high-quality entertainment across multiple channels. 



You should be comfortable supporting both strategy and practical creation (e.g. research, outlines, packaging feedback), while recognizing the CEO makes the final calls.



What we’re looking for (in order of importance)

Deep YouTube expertise — Real experience across the full scope of YouTube work: research, content and packaging thinking, and how videos are planned and improved—not only one narrow task.



Ability to work with a founder/CEO — Clear communication, fast thinking, honest feedback, and real collaboration.



Bonus (valued, not required): Video editing and graphic design — we give extra consideration to candidates who can also deliver hands-on editing or visuals, but the core hire is YouTube judgment and expertise.



Requirements

Demonstrable YouTube experience — show channels, videos, or projects where you’ve had a real impact, and what you did.

Portfolio / links required — applications without relevant examples will not be considered.

Strong written English; short video calls when needed.

Reliable internet and professional communication.



Compensation

Negotiable — based on experience, expertise, and scope of responsibility (to be discussed with shortlisted candidates).

Hiring process



We will review applications, conduct interviews, and may invite finalists to a small paid test (brief and fair) so we can see how you think and work with us.



How to apply

IMPORTANT: Start your application subject line with the word YTEXPERT555 so we know you read this posting in full. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Please include:

1. Resume or CV

2 Portfolio / links — YouTube channels or videos relevant to your experience; note your role on each (required).

3. Your YouTube background — niches, types of content, and how you’ve helped build or improve channels or videos (metrics or outcomes if you can share them).

4. How you would support a CEO running multiple entertainment channels — short paragraph (a few sentences).

5. Your view on what makes YouTube content capable of going viral or breaking out — be specific; avoid generic motivational answers.

6. Rank your own skills (required) — For each item below, give one number from 1 to 10 (1 = weakest / least experience, 10 = strongest / most experience). Do not skip any line.

- Topic and trend research

- Script writing (hooks, structure, pacing)

- Thumbnail and packaging thinking (titles, thumbnails, concepts)

- Video editing

- Graphic design

7. Availability — timezone, hours per week, earliest start date.

8. Salary expectation — even though our offer is negotiable, share what you’re looking for in USD per month so we can align early.

description:

If your focus is only on setup, this role is not a fit.



We are hiring a GHL specialist to take ownership of our system.



The foundation is built. Your role is to refine, simplify, and optimise it for performance.



This role starts part-time and will move into full-time as lead flow increases.



What matters:

• Immediate speed to lead?• Clean, simple workflow logic?• Strong follow-up (WhatsApp,
, SMS)?• Pipelines aligned with real lead behaviour?• Fixing drop-offs and improving bookings?• Fast, smooth, scalable onboarding



You will:

• Audit the system from lead to booking?• Improve follow-up timing and logic?• Clean and simplify workflows?• Build and optimise our master snapshot?• Improve onboarding (fast, frictionless, scalable)?• Implement SMS into the follow-up system?• Ensure no leads are missed



Requirements:

• Strong GHL automation experience?• Understands logic, triggers, and conditions?• Focus on conversion, not just setup?• Can take ownership and work independently



To apply, answer:

1. How quickly should a lead be contacted after submitting a form?

2. What happens in the first 2 hours if they don’t respond?

3. What’s the most common mistake in GHL workflows?

4. How would you build a scalable onboarding system using a master snapshot?

Applications without answers will not be considered.

title: Cold Outreach & Lead Gen VA (Intermediate)
description:
We are seeking an Intermediate Tech VA specializing in outbound sales operations. This role is designed for a self-starter who can own the operational layer of your cold

Compensation: Negotiable





Main Responsibilities / Day-to-Day

- Campaign Management: Manage and maintain cold
 campaigns in Instantly.ai, including sequencing updates and rigorous deliverability monitoring.

- Lead Acquisition: Research, scrape, and build targeted lead lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and related scraping tools.

- Technical Infrastructure: Handle all technical setup tasks including domain warmup, inbox rotation, tool integrations, and initial campaign configurations.

- Performance Tracking: Proactively flag issues, surface weekly updates on campaign health, and provide monthly summaries with actionable observations.

- Data Quality: Scrape, clean, and structure lead lists to ensure they are 100% campaign-ready and ICP-matched.





Essential Qualifications / Must-Haves

- Platform Expertise: Proven experience running cold
 campaigns end-to-end, specifically within Instantly.ai.

- Technical Knowledge: Deep understanding of inbox health, deliverability management, and domain warmup protocols.

- Lead Generation: Hands-on experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for lead research and list building.

- Communication: Fluent English speaker/writer capable of reviewing and managing scripts without hand-holding.

Autonomy: Strong async communicator who can take a brief and execute independently without requiring daily check-ins.





Preferred Skills / Nice-to-Haves

- Marketing Instincts: Strong copywriting skills to "punch up" a sequence and experience running A/B tests on subject lines and CTAs.

- Automation Literacy: Working knowledge of Zapier or Make to connect sales tools and reduce manual data entry.

- Sales Acumen: Familiarity with outbound sales workflows and a sharp eye for distinguishing high-quality leads from low-quality ones.





KPIs / Success Metrics

- Campaign Health: Ensuring campaigns are live, healthy, and sending without deliverability or bounce issues.

- Lead Delivery: Weekly delivery of lead lists at the agreed volume and quality (ICP-matched).

- Engagement Benchmarks: Maintaining

description:
We're a London-based Shopify ecommerce growth agency with a small team in the Philippines, looking for an experienced Google Ads Manager to take ownership of paid search across multiple client accounts.



You'll be managing campaigns across ecommerce (sneakers, golf) and service-based businesses, working within our MCC, and collaborating closely with our web developer to improve landing pages and conversion rates. We're an AI-first agency, so you should be comfortable using AI tools to analyse data, spot trends, and optimise campaigns faster.



What You'll Be Doing:



- Managing Google Ads campaigns across multiple client accounts within our MCC

- Building and optimising Search, Shopping, PMax, Display, and YouTube campaigns

- Analysing campaign data to identify opportunities and cut waste

- Using AI tools (Claude, Gemini) to process data, generate insights, and speed up optimisation

- Working with our web developer to brief and test landing page changes that improve CVR

- Running A/B tests on ad copy, landing pages, and bidding strategies

- Setting up and managing conversion tracking (GA4, Google Tag Manager)

- Producing clear performance reports for clients with actionable recommendations

- Managing budgets and pacing across accounts

- Staying on top of Google Ads platform changes and best practices

- Handling Google Merchant Centre feeds and troubleshooting disapprovals

- Supporting misrepresentation and policy suspension reinstatements where needed



What We're Looking For:



- Minimum 2 years hands-on Google Ads management experience (portfolio or case studies required)

- Proven experience managing ecommerce campaigns (Shopping, PMax)

- Strong data analysis skills, comfortable working with spreadsheets and making data-driven decisions

- Experience with MCC management across multiple accounts

- Understanding of CRO principles, landing page best practices, and how ads and on-site experience work together

- Comfortable working independently and managing your own time

- Strong English communication (written)

- Available to work UK business hours (9am-5pm GMT)



Tools You Should Be Familiar With:



Required:

- Google Ads (Search, Shopping, PMax, Display)

- Google Merchant Centre

- Google Analytics 4

- Google Tag Manager

- Google Sheets / Excel

- Claude (Anthropic) or similar AI tools for data analysis and optimisation

- Google AI Studio / Gemini



Desirable:

- Notion (task management, documentation)

- Looker Studio (reporting dashboards)

- Meta Ads (campaign setup and management)

- Klaviyo (understanding of
 flows and how they support paid traffic)

- Hotjar or Microsoft Clarity (heatmaps, session recordings)

- SEMrush or Ahrefs (keyword research, competitor analysis)

- Figma or Canva (basic creative briefs)

- Loom (screen recording for async communication)



Wage/Salary: PHP 40,000 - 70,000/mo (depending on experience)



About Us:



We're a lean, fast-moving agency that works with premium ecommerce brands across the UK. We already have a small team in the Philippines and are looking to grow. We value trust, ownership, and quality. You'll have direct access to the founder, clear briefs, and the tools you need to do great work.



Important: All company tools and software are provided strictly for client work only. Misuse of company resources for personal or external projects is grounds for immediate termination.



To Apply:



Please share examples of Google Ads accounts you've managed, including the types of campaigns, monthly spend levels, and results achieved. Tell us which AI tools you currently use in your workflow and how they help you optimise.

title: Dropshipping Product Research
description:
Product Researcher for Dropshipping Stores (Long-Term Role)



We are looking for an experienced Product Researcher to join our growing e-commerce team.

This role is 100% focused on product research for dropshipping stores. The goal is to fully outsource research and build a consistent flow of winning products, based on current and upcoming trends.

If you have proven experience researching products for dropshipping stores and understand how to validate demand using data — this role is for you.





Your Responsibilities



As our Product Researcher, you will be responsible for finding high-potential products using multiple proven research methods, including:



Competitor research (successful dropshipping stores & ads)

Google Trends analysis (identifying rising and seasonal trends)

Meta Ads Library research (analyzing active and scaling ads)

Cross-checking product demand and trend sustainability

Organizing findings clearly for handover to the team





You will work closely with:



Product listers

Supply chain managers

The store owner (strategy & direction)

Your research should allow the team to act fast and launch products with confidence.



Requirements (Must-Have)



Proven experience with dropshipping product research

Experience researching products for active dropshipping stores



Strong understanding of:



What makes a product “sellable”

Trend-based product validation

Ability to work independently and deliver structured research



Good communication skills in English



Nice to Have (Big Plus)



Experience with Google Ads for dropshipping



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Experience working in an e-commerce team (research,  listing,  sourcing)







What Success Looks Like in This Role



A constant flow of new product ideas



Products aligned with current and upcoming trends



Clear, structured research that the team can immediately use



Minimal supervision needed once onboarding is complete



The goal is long-term collaboration where product research is fully handled by you.





Position Details



Remote / Work from home



Part-time or full-time (to be discussed)



Long-term position



Competitive salary based on experience
