title: Video Editor & Creator — VSL, UGC-Style Ads, Short-Form (15-45s) for E-Commerce
description:
We're a growing e-commerce brand selling health & wellness products through Shopify stores (multiple brands). We need a skilled video creator/editor to produce high-converting video content on an ongoing basis.



WHAT YOU'LL CREATE:



- VSL (Video Sales Letters): 2-5 minute videos with text overlays, b-roll, voiceover sync, and strong hooks. Problem-agitation-solution structure.

- UGC-style ads: 15s, 30s, and 45s videos that look organic and native to
/Instagram/TikTok. Not polished — authentic and relatable.

- Short-form video ads: Punchy creatives with fast cuts, captions, motion graphics, and clear CTAs.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Edit raw footage (we provide b-roll, product shots, AI-generated clips, and sometimes UGC raw footage)

- Add captions/subtitles (English and French), text overlays, transitions, sound effects, and music

- Create scroll-stopping hooks (first 3 seconds)

- Adapt one video into multiple formats (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)

- Deliver 10-15 videos per week once ramped up

- Follow brand guidelines and reference videos we provide



TOOLS YOU SHOULD KNOW (at least 2):



- CapCut (preferred for short-form)

- Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

- After Effects (bonus for motion graphics)

- Canva (for simple overlays)



WHAT MAKES YOU A GREAT FIT:



- You understand direct-response advertising (hooks, pain points, CTAs)

- You've edited ads that actually ran on
 or TikTok

- You can match the style of a reference video we send you

- You're fast — can turn around a 30s ad edit in under 2 hours

- You communicate clearly and meet deadlines



TO APPLY, YOU MUST INCLUDE:



1. Your portfolio or link to 3-5 video samples (ads, VSL, or UGC-style — NOT wedding/corporate)

2. A short Loom video (under 2 minutes) introducing yourself and showing your editing workspace

3. List your available tools/software

4. Your expected monthly salary (full-time)

5. Answer this question: "What makes a
 video ad stop the scroll in the first 3 seconds?"



Applications without a portfolio and without the Loom video will NOT be reviewed.

title: Job Title: Growth Integrator (Tech + Operations Hybrid)
description:
Job Title: Tech VA Growth Integrator (Tech + Operations Hybrid) 

Location: Remote 

Compensation: $1,500/month  



Role Overview 

We are looking for a high-leverage Growth Integrator to support two fast-growing businesses 

across outbound growth and operational systems. This is a hybrid role combining technical 

execution, systems management, and operations ownership. 

You will act as the central operator, ensuring that both growth systems and operational 

infrastructure run smoothly, efficiently, and at scale. 

The candidate must speak in "workflows and tasks," taking high-level objectives and breaking 

them down into actionable steps to prevent miscommunication. 

This is not a task-based VA role we are looking for someone who takes ownership, thinks in 

systems, and proactively solves problems without constant supervision.



Key Responsibilities 

1. B2B Growth Execution (60%) 

• Execute and manage highly personalized, low-volume/high-touch executive outbound 

campaigns" (We want to filter out volume-based spammers).Work within tools such as 

Clay, Apollo, CRMs, and enrichment platforms  

• Manage inboxes, monitor replies, and handle initial lead qualification  

• Convert qualified leads into booked discovery calls  

• Maintain
 deliverability (domain setup, warm-up, inbox health)  

• Troubleshoot campaign issues and resolve technical problems independently  

• Support onboarding of new clients into outbound systems  





2. STR Operations & Systems (40%) 

• Manage and maintain property management systems and integrations  

• Oversee backend systems supporting Meta Ads and lead intake funnels  

• Coordinate onboarding workflows, contracts, and system setup  

• Oversee a fractional front-desk service (not direct 24/7 support)  

• Handle operational escalations (e.g., vendor coordination, backup dispatch) 





3. Cross-Business Responsibilities 

• Build, document, and maintain SOPs across both businesses  

• Ensure all systems run smoothly with minimal oversight, Act as your own project 

manager—breaking down abstract, high-level goals into defined workflows, sprints, and 

trackable tasks. 

• Identify inefficiencies and proactively implement improvements  

• Act as a reliable and discreet operator, maintaining confidentiality and integrity and 

maintain a shared operational lexicon (speaking strictly in "workflows and tasks") with 

the founder to eliminate miscommunication.





Required Qualifications (Must-Haves) 

• Strong experience with outbound systems (Clay, Apollo, CRMs, multi-inbox setups)  

• Deep understanding of
 deliverability (domains, warm-up, inbox health)  

• Experience managing and troubleshooting automation workflows  

• Excellent written English (client-facing communication)  

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail and system thinking  

• Ability to work independently without hand-holding  

• Experience managing inboxes and handling B2B lead responses  

• Comfortable working across multiple tools and platforms  

• High level of reliability, discretion, and integrity  

• Experience with Agile product/project management methodologies (sprints, backlogs, 

iterative execution). 

• Fluency in project management tools (Notion, Asana, ClickUp, or Jira) and the ability to 

self-assign and manage tasks without prompting. 

• Ability to translate abstract business ideas into structured, step-by-step operational 

workflows. 

• Understanding of complex, high-ticket B2B sales cycles



Preferred Qualifications (Nice-to-Have) 

• Experience in short-term rental or property management systems  

• Familiarity with Meta Ads backend and funnel management  

• Experience supporting agencies or consultants selling high-ticket B2B services  

• Experience creating SOPs and operational documentation  

• Exposure to tools like GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make, or similar automation platforms  

• Ability to understand and speak Portuguese. 

Success Metrics (KPIs) 

• System uptime and reliability (minimal errors, consistent workflows)  

• Speed of execution (build and deployment turnaround time)  

• Lead flow continuity (no drop-offs in capture or follow-ups)  

• CRM accuracy (clean data, correct tagging, no duplicates)  

• Automation performance (triggers and sequences working properly)  

• Time saved through automation and system improvements  

• Issue resolution speed (identifying and fixing problems quickly)  

• SOP completeness and clarity  

• Inbox and lead handling efficiency (maintaining a < 15-minute response time during 

working hours)."System scalability across clients and properties



Hiring Process 

Round 1 – Interview with Talent Team (skills + experience assessment) 

Round 2 – Interview with Hiring Manager (project scope + compensation discussion) 





If interested kindly send your resume/cv and a brief background of your experience.

title: Creative Content Assistant (Soft Feminine Luxury Aesthetic + SMM Agency Support)
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a creative, detail-obsessed content assistant with a natural eye for soft feminine luxury aesthetics. 



You’ll be supporting content across three personal brands (Feminine Finance, Feminine Energy, Lifestyle & Golf), while also assisting with our growing Social Media Marketing Agency.



This role is perfect for someone who loves beautiful visuals, understands elevated branding, and wants to grow within a fast-scaling, creative environment.



Weekly Creative Output (~15 Hours)



You will be responsible for producing and refining content that feels intentional, elegant, and high-quality:



- 1 Long-Form Video (10–15 minutes)

(YouTube edit + thumbnail design)

- 2 Short-Form Clips

(Cut from long-form content for Reels/TikTok)

- 6 Short-Form Videos

(Editing provided raw footage into high-performing Reels/TikToks)

- 2 Static Posts

(Aesthetic quote-style content)

- 2 Educational Carousels

Aesthetic Curation

(Selecting refined audio, ensuring cohesive “soft luxury” visuals across all content)



Agency Support (~5 Hours)



- Assist in content creation for agency clients

- Adapt to different brand voices and visual directions

- Support with simple editing (video, captions, graphics) for client deliverables



Note: Weekly deliverables may shift based on priorities.



Who This Role Is For

This is for someone who doesn’t just edit content, you understand the feeling behind it.



- You naturally gravitate toward “clean girl,” minimalist, soft luxury aesthetics

- You notice the small details (fonts, spacing, color grading, flow)

- You can switch between feminine lifestyle content and polished business content seamlessly

- You are reliable, organized, and take ownership of your work

- You have your own setup and are proficient in:

CapCut and/or Adobe Premiere Pro

Canva



Growth Opportunity

This role has a clear path to full-time as the brand and agency continue to expand.

We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not just complete tasks.



How to Apply



Please send the following:

- A short introduction + why you’re a strong fit

- Your portfolio

(Video + graphic work — feminine aesthetic preferred, plus any client work)

- Your resume



Start your application with “LUXE” so we know you’ve read the full description.



Note: Shortlisted applicants will be given a paid trial task.
